Introduction

Base URL: https://api.anhnguhana.com

This documentation aims to provide all the information you need to work with our API.

As you scroll, you'll see code examples for working with the API in different programming languages in the dark area to the right (or as part of the content on mobile). You can switch the language used with the tabs at the top right (or from the nav menu at the top left on mobile).

Authenticating requests

To authenticate requests, include an Authorization header with the value "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}".

All authenticated endpoints are marked with a requires authentication badge in the documentation below.

You can retrieve your token by visiting your dashboard and clicking Generate API token.

CRM - Lead

Manage leads / prospective customers (lead.md §2–§7).

List leads

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/list?search=Nguy%E1%BB%85n&business_id=1&branch_id=1&status=pending&source=facebook&owner_id=1&name=V%C4%83n+A&email=example.com&phone=0901&contacted_from=2026-01-01&contacted_to=2026-12-31&tag_ids[]=1&tag_ids[]=2&course_ids[]=1&sort_by=created_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "Nguyễn",
    "business_id": "1",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "status": "pending",
    "source": "facebook",
    "owner_id": "1",
    "name": "Văn A",
    "email": "example.com",
    "phone": "0901",
    "contacted_from": "2026-01-01",
    "contacted_to": "2026-12-31",
    "tag_ids[0]": "1",
    "tag_ids[1]": "2",
    "course_ids[0]": "1",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "code": "LEAD000001",
                "name": "Nguyễn Văn A",
                "gender": "male",
                "dob": "2010-03-20",
                "email": "a@example.com",
                "phone": "0901234567",
                "source": "facebook",
                "status": "pending",
                "note": null,
                "previous_status": null,
                "suspended_at": null,
                "suspend_reason": null,
                "suspended_by": null,
                "guardians_count": 1,
                "students_count": 0,
                "business_id": 1,
                "branch_id": 1,
                "owner_id": 1,
                "created_by": 1,
                "updated_by": null,
                "deleted_by": null,
                "created_at": "2026-06-01T08:00:00.000000Z",
                "updated_at": "2026-06-01T08:00:00.000000Z",
                "deleted_at": null
            }
        ],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 1,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/crm/lead/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by code, name, email or phone. Example: Nguyễn

business_id   integer  optional    

Filter by business id. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by branch id. Example: 1

status   string  optional    

Filter by status: pending, verified, studying, inactive. Example: pending

source   string  optional    

Filter by lead source. Example: facebook

owner_id   integer  optional    

Filter by assigned staff id. Example: 1

name   string  optional    

Partial match on name. Example: Văn A

email   string  optional    

Partial match on email. Example: example.com

phone   string  optional    

Partial match on phone. Example: 0901

contacted_from   string  optional    

date Filter leads contacted on or after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-01-01

contacted_to   string  optional    

date Filter leads contacted on or before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

tag_ids   integer[]  optional    

Filter by tag ids.

course_ids   integer[]  optional    

Filter by interested course ids.

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: code, name, status, created_at. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

Lead detail

requires authentication

Returns the full lead record with all relations and its change history.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/detail/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "lead": {
            "id": 1,
            "code": "LEAD000001",

                {

Request      

GET v1/crm/lead/detail/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The lead ID. Example: 1

Create lead

requires authentication

Creates a new lead with optional guardians, linked students, tags and courses.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"Nguyễn Văn A\",
    \"gender\": \"male\",
    \"dob\": \"2010-03-20\",
    \"email\": \"a@example.com\",
    \"phone\": \"0901234567\",
    \"source\": \"facebook\",
    \"status\": \"pending\",
    \"owner_id\": 1,
    \"business_id\": 1,
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"note\": \"Tư vấn qua Zalo\",
    \"tag_ids\": [
        17
    ],
    \"course_ids\": [
        17
    ],
    \"guardians\": [
        {
            \"full_name\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
            \"relationship\": \"mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq\",
            \"phone\": \"xbajwbpilpmufinll\",
            \"email\": \"okemmer@example.com\"
        }
    ],
    \"students\": [
        {
            \"student_id\": 17,
            \"relationship\": \"mother\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "Nguyễn Văn A",
    "gender": "male",
    "dob": "2010-03-20",
    "email": "a@example.com",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "source": "facebook",
    "status": "pending",
    "owner_id": 1,
    "business_id": 1,
    "branch_id": 1,
    "note": "Tư vấn qua Zalo",
    "tag_ids": [
        17
    ],
    "course_ids": [
        17
    ],
    "guardians": [
        {
            "full_name": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
            "relationship": "mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq",
            "phone": "xbajwbpilpmufinll",
            "email": "okemmer@example.com"
        }
    ],
    "students": [
        {
            "student_id": 17,
            "relationship": "mother"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo khách hàng thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "LEAD000001",
        "name": "Nguyễn Văn A",
        "gender": "male",
        "dob": "2010-03-20",
        "email": "a@example.com",
        "phone": "0901234567",
        "source": "facebook",
        "status": "pending",
        "note": null,
        "business_id": 1,
        "branch_id": 1,
        "owner_id": 1,
        "guardians": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "full_name": "Nguyễn Văn B",
                "relationship": "Bố",
                "phone": "0907654321",
                "email": null
            }
        ],
        "students": [],
        "tags": [],
        "courses": [],
        "created_by": 1,
        "updated_by": null,
        "deleted_by": null,
        "created_at": "2026-06-01T08:00:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-06-01T08:00:00.000000Z",
        "deleted_at": null
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/crm/lead/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Full name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Nguyễn Văn A

gender   string  optional    

male|female|other. Example: male

Must be one of:
  • male
  • female
  • other
dob   string  optional    

Date of birth (<= today). Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 2010-03-20

email   string  optional    

Contact email. Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: a@example.com

phone   string     

Contact phone (unique among active leads). Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0901234567

source   string     

Lead source. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: facebook

status   string  optional    

Initial status (defaults to pending): pending|verified|studying|inactive. Example: pending

Must be one of:
  • pending
  • verified
  • studying
  • inactive
owner_id   integer     

Assigned staff (user) id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

business_id   integer  optional    

Business id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Tư vấn qua Zalo

tag_ids   integer[]  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

course_ids   integer[]  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

guardians   object[]  optional    

Guardians to create alongside the lead.
full_name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

relationship   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq

phone   string     

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: xbajwbpilpmufinll

email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: okemmer@example.com

students   object[]  optional    

Existing students to link.
student_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

relationship   string  optional    

Example: mother

Must be one of:
  • father
  • mother
  • guardian
  • grandfather
  • grandmother
  • uncle
  • aunt
  • other

Update lead

requires authentication

Partial update — only send fields to change. Code, business and status are immutable.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"Nguyễn Văn A\",
    \"gender\": \"male\",
    \"dob\": \"2010-03-20\",
    \"email\": \"a@example.com\",
    \"phone\": \"0901234567\",
    \"source\": \"zalo\",
    \"owner_id\": 1,
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"note\": \"Đã tư vấn lần 2\",
    \"tag_ids\": [
        17
    ],
    \"course_ids\": [
        17
    ],
    \"guardians\": [
        {
            \"full_name\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
            \"relationship\": \"mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq\",
            \"phone\": \"xbajwbpilpmufinll\",
            \"email\": \"okemmer@example.com\"
        }
    ],
    \"students\": [
        {
            \"student_id\": 17,
            \"relationship\": \"other\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "Nguyễn Văn A",
    "gender": "male",
    "dob": "2010-03-20",
    "email": "a@example.com",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "source": "zalo",
    "owner_id": 1,
    "branch_id": 1,
    "note": "Đã tư vấn lần 2",
    "tag_ids": [
        17
    ],
    "course_ids": [
        17
    ],
    "guardians": [
        {
            "full_name": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
            "relationship": "mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq",
            "phone": "xbajwbpilpmufinll",
            "email": "okemmer@example.com"
        }
    ],
    "students": [
        {
            "student_id": 17,
            "relationship": "other"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật khách hàng thành công.",

        "id": 1,
        "code": "LEAD000001",
        "name": "Nguyễn Văn A",
        "gender": "male",
        "dob": "2010-03-20",
        "email": "a@example.com",
        "phone": "0901234567",

        "status": "pending",
        "note": "Đã tư vấn",
        "business_id": 1,
        "branch_id": 1,
        "owner_id": 2,
        "guardians": [],
        "students": [],
        "tags": [],
        "courses": [],

        "updated_by": 2,
        "deleted_by": null,
        "created_at": "2026-06-01T08:00:00.000000Z",

Request      

PUT v1/crm/lead/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The lead ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Full name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Nguyễn Văn A

gender   string  optional    

male|female|other. Example: male

Must be one of:
  • male
  • female
  • other
dob   string  optional    

Date of birth (<= today). Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 2010-03-20

email   string  optional    

Contact email. Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: a@example.com

phone   string  optional    

Contact phone (unique among active leads). Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0901234567

source   string  optional    

Lead source. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: zalo

owner_id   integer  optional    

Assigned staff (user) id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Đã tư vấn lần 2

tag_ids   integer[]  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

course_ids   integer[]  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

guardians   object[]  optional    

Guardians (replaces all existing when provided).
full_name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

relationship   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq

phone   string     

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: xbajwbpilpmufinll

email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: okemmer@example.com

students   object[]  optional    

Linked students (replaces all existing when provided).
student_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

relationship   string  optional    

Example: other

Must be one of:
  • father
  • mother
  • guardian
  • grandfather
  • grandmother
  • uncle
  • aunt
  • other

Suspend lead

requires authentication

Moves a lead to "inactive" status and records the reason in the history.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/suspend/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Không còn nhu cầu\",
    \"note\": \"Sẽ liên hệ lại sau 3 tháng\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/suspend/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Không còn nhu cầu",
    "note": "Sẽ liên hệ lại sau 3 tháng"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Ngừng khách hàng thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "LEAD000001",
        "name": "Nguyễn Văn A",
        "status": "inactive",
        "previous_status": "pending",
        "suspended_at": "2026-06-13T09:00:00.000000Z",
        "suspend_reason": "Không còn nhu cầu",
        "suspended_by": 1,
        "business_id": 1,
        "branch_id": 1,
        "owner_id": 1,
        "created_at": "2026-06-01T08:00:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-06-13T09:00:00.000000Z",
        "deleted_at": null
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Already inactive):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Khách hàng đang ở trạng thái ngừng.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

POST v1/crm/lead/suspend/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The lead ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

reason   string     

Reason for suspending the lead. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: Không còn nhu cầu

note   string  optional    

Additional note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Sẽ liên hệ lại sau 3 tháng

Restore lead

requires authentication

Reactivates an inactive lead, returning it to its pre-suspend status (or "pending" when unknown).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/restore/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/restore/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Khôi phục khách hàng thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "LEAD000001",
        "name": "Nguyễn Văn A",
        "status": "pending",
        "previous_status": null,
        "suspended_at": null,
        "suspend_reason": null,

        "branch_id": 1,

        "updated_at": "2026-06-13T10:00:00.000000Z",
        "deleted_at": null
    },

}

CRM - Lead Guardians

Manage the guardians of a lead (lead.md §8 "Quản lý Người giám hộ").

List guardians for a lead

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/1/guardian/list?per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/1/guardian/list"
);

const params = {
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Add guardian to a lead

requires authentication

curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/1/guardian/add" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"lead_id\": 17,
    \"full_name\": \"Nguyễn Văn B\",
    \"relationship\": \"Bố\",
    \"phone\": \"0907654321\",
    \"email\": \"guardian@example.com\"
}"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/1/guardian/add"
);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "full_name": "Nguyễn Văn B",
    "relationship": "Bố",
    "phone": "0907654321",
    "email": "guardian@example.com"

}).then(response => response.json());

CRM - Lead Students

Manage the students linked to a lead (lead.md §9 "Liên kết học viên").

List students linked to a lead

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/1/student/list?per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/1/student/list"
);

const params = {
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST v1/crm/lead/{leadId}/student/add

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

leadId   integer     

The lead ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

lead_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

student_id   integer     

Active student id (may be linked once per lead). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

relationship   string  optional    

father|mother|guardian|grandfather|grandmother|uncle|aunt|other. Example: father

Must be one of:
  • father
  • mother
  • guardian
  • grandfather
  • grandmother
  • uncle
  • aunt
  • other

Update student–lead relationship

requires authentication

Only the relationship type is editable; the lead and student are immutable.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/1/student/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"relationship\": \"mother\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/lead/1/student/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "relationship": "mother"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

CRM - Parent

Manage parents / guardians.

List parents

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent/list?search=robert&business_id=1&branch_id=1&status=active&relation=father&student_id=1&created_from=2026-01-01&created_to=2026-12-31&sort_by=created_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "robert",
    "business_id": "1",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "status": "active",
    "relation": "father",
    "student_id": "1",
    "created_from": "2026-01-01",
    "created_to": "2026-12-31",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET v1/crm/parent/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by parent code, name, email or phone. Example: robert

business_id   integer  optional    

Filter by business id. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by branch id. Example: 1

status   string  optional    

Filter by status. Example: active

relation   string  optional    

Filter by relation to a student (father, mother, ...). Example: father

student_id   integer  optional    

Filter parents linked to this student id. Example: 1

created_from   string  optional    

date Created on or after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-01-01

created_to   string  optional    

date Created on or before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: code, name, created_at. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

Create parent

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"Robert Smith\",
    \"gender\": \"male\",
    \"dob\": \"1985-03-20\",
    \"avatar\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"email\": \"robert@example.com\",
    \"phone\": \"0922222222\",
    \"address\": \"123 Le Loi\",
    \"province\": \"Ho Chi Minh\",
    \"district\": \"District 7\",
    \"business_id\": 1,
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"occupation\": \"Engineer\",
    \"company\": \"ABC Corp\",
    \"note\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"students\": [
        {
            \"student_id\": 17,
            \"relation\": \"mother\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "Robert Smith",
    "gender": "male",
    "dob": "1985-03-20",
    "avatar": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "email": "robert@example.com",
    "phone": "0922222222",
    "address": "123 Le Loi",
    "province": "Ho Chi Minh",
    "district": "District 7",
    "business_id": 1,
    "branch_id": 1,
    "occupation": "Engineer",
    "company": "ABC Corp",
    "note": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "students": [
        {
            "student_id": 17,
            "relation": "mother"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

    "msg": "Tạo phụ huynh thành công.",

Request      

POST v1/crm/parent/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Full name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Robert Smith

gender   string  optional    

male|female|other. Example: male

Must be one of:
  • male
  • female
  • other
dob   string  optional    

Date of birth (<= today). Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 1985-03-20

avatar   string  optional    

Avatar URL. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

email   string  optional    

Contact email. Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: robert@example.com

phone   string     

Contact phone. Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0922222222

address   string  optional    

Address. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: 123 Le Loi

province   string  optional    

Province / city. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Ho Chi Minh

district   string  optional    

District. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: District 7

business_id   integer     

Business id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

branch_id   integer     

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

occupation   string  optional    

Occupation. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Engineer

company   string  optional    

Company. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: ABC Corp

note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

students   object[]  optional    

Students to link.
student_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

relation   string  optional    

Example: mother

Must be one of:
  • father
  • mother
  • guardian
  • grandfather
  • grandmother
  • uncle
  • aunt
  • other

Update parent

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"Robert Smith\",
    \"gender\": \"male\",
    \"dob\": \"1985-03-20\",
    \"avatar\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"email\": \"robert@example.com\",
    \"phone\": \"0922222222\",
    \"address\": \"123 Le Loi\",
    \"province\": \"Ho Chi Minh\",
    \"district\": \"District 7\",
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"occupation\": \"Engineer\",
    \"company\": \"ABC Corp\",
    \"note\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"students\": [
        {
            \"student_id\": 17,
            \"relation\": \"grandfather\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "Robert Smith",
    "gender": "male",
    "dob": "1985-03-20",
    "avatar": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "email": "robert@example.com",
    "phone": "0922222222",
    "address": "123 Le Loi",
    "province": "Ho Chi Minh",
    "district": "District 7",
    "branch_id": 1,
    "occupation": "Engineer",
    "company": "ABC Corp",
    "note": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "students": [
        {
            "student_id": 17,
            "relation": "grandfather"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The parent ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Full name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Robert Smith

gender   string  optional    

male|female|other. Example: male

Must be one of:
  • male
  • female
  • other
dob   string  optional    

Date of birth (<= today). Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 1985-03-20

avatar   string  optional    

Avatar URL. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

email   string  optional    

Contact email. Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: robert@example.com

phone   string  optional    

Contact phone. Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0922222222

address   string  optional    

Address. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: 123 Le Loi

province   string  optional    

Province / city. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Ho Chi Minh

district   string  optional    

District. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: District 7

branch_id   integer  optional    

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

occupation   string  optional    

Occupation. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Engineer

company   string  optional    

Company. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: ABC Corp

note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

students   object[]  optional    

Students to link (replaces existing links).
student_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

relation   string  optional    

Example: grandfather

Must be one of:
  • father
  • mother
  • guardian
  • grandfather
  • grandmother
  • uncle
  • aunt
  • other

curl --request POST \

    --data "{
    \"suspend_date\": \"2026-06-12\",
    \"reason\": \"Ngừng liên hệ\",
    \"note\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\"
}"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent/suspend/1"

requires authentication

    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

);

    "relation": "father",
    "is_primary_contact": "1",
    "is_billing_contact": "1",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "parent_status": "active",
    "student_status": "active",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

GET v1/crm/parent-student/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by parent or student code/name. Example: alice

relation   string  optional    

Filter by relation (father, mother, ...). Example: father

is_primary_contact   boolean  optional    

Filter by primary-contact flag. Example: true

is_billing_contact   boolean  optional    

Filter by billing-contact flag. Example: true

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by the student's branch id. Example: 1

parent_status   string  optional    

Filter by the parent's status. Example: active

student_status   string  optional    

Filter by the student's status. Example: active

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: relation, created_at. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent-student/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent-student/detail/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",

        "parent_id": 1,
        "student_id": 1,
        "relation": "father",
        "is_primary_contact": true,
        "is_billing_contact": true,
        "is_pickup_authorized": true,
        "note": null
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null

Create parent-student link

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent-student/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"parent_id\": 1,
    \"student_id\": 1,
    \"relation\": \"father\",
    \"is_primary_contact\": true,
    \"is_billing_contact\": true,
    \"is_pickup_authorized\": false,
    \"note\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent-student/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "parent_id": 1,
    "student_id": 1,
    "relation": "father",
    "is_primary_contact": true,
    "is_billing_contact": true,
    "is_pickup_authorized": false,
    "note": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thêm quan hệ học viên thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "parent_id": 1,
        "student_id": 1,
        "relation": "father",
        "is_primary_contact": true
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

POST v1/crm/parent-student/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

parent_id   integer     

Active parent id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

student_id   integer     

Active student id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

relation   string     

father|mother|guardian|grandfather|grandmother|uncle|aunt|other. Example: father

Must be one of:
  • father
  • mother
  • guardian
  • grandfather
  • grandmother
  • uncle
  • aunt
  • other
is_primary_contact   boolean  optional    

Main contact. Example: true

is_billing_contact   boolean  optional    

Receives invoices. Example: true

is_pickup_authorized   boolean  optional    

Authorized to pick up the student. Example: false

note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

Update parent-student link

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent-student/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"relation\": \"mother\",
    \"is_primary_contact\": true,
    \"is_billing_contact\": true,
    \"is_pickup_authorized\": false,
    \"note\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\"
}"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/crm/parent-student/update/1"
);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "relation": "mother",
    "is_primary_contact": true,
    "is_billing_contact": true,
    "is_pickup_authorized": false,
    "note": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",

    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Core - Authentication

Login, registration, OTP, password reset and related account flows. Most endpoints are public; ones marked @authenticated require a bearer token.

Login

Authenticates a user and returns an access token. Requires a device-code header (obtain one from POST /api/auth/device/init).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/login" \
    --header "Device-code: {your-device-code}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"username\": \"super\",
    \"password\": \"12345678\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/login"
);

const headers = {
    "Device-code": "{your-device-code}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "username": "super",
    "password": "12345678"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Đăng nhập thành công !",
    "data": {
        "verify_auth": 0,
        "user": {
            "id": 1,
            "username": "super",
            "full_name": "John Doe",
            "email": "super@example.com"
        },
        "token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiJ9...",
        "access_id": "a1b2c3"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Wrong credentials):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": {
        "field": "password",
        "message": "Mật khẩu không hợp lệ"
    },
    "data": null,
    "code": 500,
    "errors": []
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/auth/login

Headers

Device-code        

Example: {your-device-code}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

username   string     

The username. Example: super

password   string     

The password. Example: 12345678

Verify OTP

Verifies a one-time code and issues an access token. Locks the account after 5 wrong attempts.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/verify-otp" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_id\": 1,
    \"otp_code\": \"123456\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/verify-otp"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "user_id": 1,
    "otp_code": "123456"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "verify_auth": 1,
        "user": {
            "id": 1,
            "username": "super"
        },
        "token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGci...",
        "access_id": 123
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/auth/verify-otp

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

user_id   integer     

The user ID. Example: 1

otp_code   string     

The 6-digit OTP. Example: 123456

Check auth (SSO handoff)

Validates an encrypted access_id payload and issues a fresh token for the user.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/check-auth" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"salt\": \"a1b2\",
    \"iv\": \"c3d4\",
    \"da\": \"U2FsdGVk...\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/check-auth"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "salt": "a1b2",
    "iv": "c3d4",
    "da": "U2FsdGVk..."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "user": {
            "id": 1,
            "username": "super",
            "full_name": "John Doe"
        },
        "token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGci..."
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/auth/check-auth

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

salt   string     

Encryption salt (hex). Example: a1b2

iv   string     

Encryption IV (hex). Example: c3d4

da   string     

The encrypted payload (base64). Example: U2FsdGVk...

Forgot password

Sends a reset-password link (or activation link if the account is not yet active).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/forgot-password" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"email\": \"super@example.com\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/forgot-password"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "email": "super@example.com"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Vui lòng kiểm tra email để khôi phục mật khẩu !",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "email": "super@example.com"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/auth/forgot-password

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

email   string     

The account email / username. Example: super@example.com

Register

Registers either a business account (creates business + owner + defaults) or an individual account, depending on the type field.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/register" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"type\": \"individual\",
    \"full_name\": \"John Doe\",
    \"email\": \"super@example.com\",
    \"phone\": \"0900000000\",
    \"password\": \"secret123\",
    \"name\": \"Hana English\",
    \"owner_name\": \"Jane Owner\",
    \"owner_email\": \"owner@example.com\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/register"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "type": "individual",
    "full_name": "John Doe",
    "email": "super@example.com",
    "phone": "0900000000",
    "password": "secret123",
    "name": "Hana English",
    "owner_name": "Jane Owner",
    "owner_email": "owner@example.com"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Đăng ký tài khoản thành công",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "full_name": "John Doe",
        "email": "super@example.com",
        "type": "individual",
        "is_active": 1
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/auth/register

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

type   string     

Either "business" or "individual". Example: individual

full_name   string  optional    

Required for individual. Example: John Doe

email   string     

The account email. Example: super@example.com

phone   string  optional    

The phone number. Example: 0900000000

password   string  optional    

Required for individual. Example: secret123

name   string  optional    

Required for business (business name). Example: Hana English

owner_name   string  optional    

Required for business. Example: Jane Owner

owner_email   string  optional    

Required for business. Example: owner@example.com

Logout

requires authentication

Revokes the current access token and clears the user session.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/logout" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/logout"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": "Bạn đã đăng xuất thành công!",
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (401):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "No permision!!",
    "data": null,
    "code": 401,
    "errors": []
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/auth/logout

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Reset password

Resets the password using a valid reset token.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/reset-password" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"token\": \"9f8c7b...\",
    \"type\": \"reset_password\",
    \"password\": \"newSecret123\",
    \"confirm_password\": \"newSecret123\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/reset-password"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "token": "9f8c7b...",
    "type": "reset_password",
    "password": "newSecret123",
    "confirm_password": "newSecret123"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Đặt lại mật khẩu thành công !",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "username": "super",
        "email": "super@example.com"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/auth/reset-password

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

token   string     

The reset token. Example: 9f8c7b...

type   string     

The token type. Example: reset_password

password   string     

The new password. Example: newSecret123

confirm_password   string     

Must match password. Example: newSecret123

Activate account

Activates a user account using an activation token.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/account-activation" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"token\": \"9f8c7b...\",
    \"type\": \"activation\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/account-activation"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "token": "9f8c7b...",
    "type": "activation"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Đã kích hoạt tài khoản thành công !",
    "data": {
        "id": 5,
        "user_id": 1,
        "type": "activation"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/auth/account-activation

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

token   string     

The activation token. Example: 9f8c7b...

type   string     

The token type. Example: activation

Resend OTP

Re-sends the OTP email for a user (blocked after 5 wrong attempts).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/resend-otp" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_id\": 1
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/resend-otp"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "user_id": 1
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": "Đã gửi lại thành công mã OTP",
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

POST api/auth/resend-otp

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

Verify token

Validates a one-time token (e.g. activation / reset) of a given type.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/verify-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"token\": \"9f8c7b...\",
    \"type\": \"reset_password\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/verify-token"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "token": "9f8c7b...",
    "type": "reset_password"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Xác thực thành công !",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "user_id": 1,
        "token": "9f8c7b...",
        "type": "reset_password",
        "expired": "2026-06-12T00:05:00.000000Z"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/auth/verify-token

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

token   string     

The token to verify. Example: 9f8c7b...

type   string     

The token type. Example: reset_password

Internal helper that renders the individual-registration mail template. Not part of the public API.

    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/test"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Send account activation email

Generates an activation token and emails an activation link to the user.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/send-mail-active-account" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_id\": 1
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/send-mail-active-account"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "user_id": 1
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Vui lòng kiểm tra email để kích hoạt tài khoản !",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "username": "super",
        "email": "super@example.com"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

user_id   integer     

The user ID. Example: 1

Reset password directly

Resets a user's password by user id (admin / direct flow) and revokes existing tokens.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/reset-direct-password" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_id\": 1,
    \"password\": \"newSecret123\",
    \"confirm_password\": \"newSecret123\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/reset-direct-password"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "user_id": 1,
    "password": "newSecret123",
    "confirm_password": "newSecret123"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Đặt lại mật khẩu thành công !",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "username": "super"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/auth/reset-direct-password

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

user_id   integer     

The user ID. Example: 1

password   string     

The new password. Example: newSecret123

confirm_password   string     

Must match password. Example: newSecret123

Login with Google

Verifies a Google ID token and signs the user in.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/login-google" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"client_id\": \"1234.apps.googleusercontent.com\",
    \"access_token\": \"ya29...\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/login-google"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "client_id": "1234.apps.googleusercontent.com",
    "access_token": "ya29..."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "user": {
            "id": 1,
            "email": "super@example.com"
        },
        "token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1Qi..."
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/auth/login-google

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

client_id   string     

The Google OAuth client id. Example: 1234.apps.googleusercontent.com

access_token   string     

The Google ID token. Example: ya29...

Core - Common

Device bootstrap and calendar helpers. Public (no token required).

Days in month

Returns calendar metadata for each day of the requested month.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/device/days-in-month?month=6&year=2026" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/device/days-in-month"
);

const params = {
    "month": "6",
    "year": "2026",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": [
        {
            "day": 1,
            "month": 6,
            "year": 2026,
            "day_of_week": "Monday",
            "date": "01/06/2026",
            "is_holiday": false,
            "is_week_day": true,
            "is_week_end": false,
            "is_today": false
        }
    ],
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/auth/device/days-in-month

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

month   integer  optional    

The month (1-12). Defaults to current month. Example: 6

year   integer  optional    

The year. Defaults to current year. Example: 2026

Core - File

Upload / download / import files. Requires a bearer token and a device-code header.

Upload a file

requires authentication

Stores an uploaded file (max 10MB) and registers it as media.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/file/upload" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Device-code: {your-device-code}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "app_id=2"\
    --form "secure_code=abc123"\
    --form "title=Invoice"\
    --form "description=March invoice"\
    --form "file=@/tmp/php18tSHP" 
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/file/upload"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Device-code": "{your-device-code}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('app_id', '2');
body.append('secure_code', 'abc123');
body.append('title', 'Invoice');
body.append('description', 'March invoice');
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "message": "Tải file lên hệ thống thành công",
        "image": "http://localhost/hana-api/storage/uploads/invoice.pdf",
        "id": 10
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/file/upload

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Device-code        

Example: {your-device-code}

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

file   file     

The file to upload (max 10MB). Example: /tmp/php18tSHP

app_id   integer     

Application id (must be 2). Example: 2

secure_code   string     

Security code. Example: abc123

title   string  optional    

The file title. Example: Invoice

description   string  optional    

Optional description. Example: March invoice

Download a file

requires authentication

Returns the media record together with a base64 data URI of the file contents.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/file/download/10" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/file/download/10"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "detail": {
        "id": 10,
        "file_name": "invoice.pdf",
        "file_path": "storage/uploads/invoice.pdf",
        "file_type": "application/pdf"
    },
    "src": "data: application/pdf;base64,JVBERi0xLjQK..."
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/file/download/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The media ID. Example: 10

Import a spreadsheet

requires authentication

Parses an uploaded xlsx/csv/xls file and returns its rows (header row removed).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/file/import" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Device-code: {your-device-code}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "app_id=2"\
    --form "secure_code=abc123"\
    --form "file=@/tmp/phpTzxZLN" 
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/file/import"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Device-code": "{your-device-code}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('app_id', '2');
body.append('secure_code', 'abc123');
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": [
        [
            "Nguyễn Văn A",
            "a@example.com",
            "0900000000"
        ]
    ],
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/file/import

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Device-code        

Example: {your-device-code}

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

file   file     

The spreadsheet to import (xlsx/csv/xls). Example: /tmp/phpTzxZLN

app_id   integer     

Application id (must be 2). Example: 2

secure_code   string     

Security code. Example: abc123

CKEditor upload

requires authentication

Upload endpoint compatible with the CKEditor image plugin.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/file/ckeditor-upload" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "ckCsrfToken=token123"\
    --form "upload=@/tmp/phpE3oKPl" 
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/file/ckeditor-upload"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('ckCsrfToken', 'token123');
body.append('upload', document.querySelector('input[name="upload"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "default": "http://localhost/hana-api/storage/uploads/image.png"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/file/ckeditor-upload

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

upload   file     

The file to upload. Example: /tmp/phpE3oKPl

ckCsrfToken   string     

CKEditor CSRF token. Example: token123

Core - Health

Liveness / connectivity probes. These endpoints are public (no token required).

    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/health" \

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/health"
);

    "Accept": "application/json",

    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Connectivity check

Reports database / cache / storage / auth status. If a bearer token is supplied, the authenticated user is included.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/connect" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/connect"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "status": "ok",
        "agent": "Mozilla/5.0",
        "ip": "127.0.0.1",
        "timestamp": "2026-06-12T00:00:00+00:00",
        "services": {
            "database": "ok",
            "cache": "ok",
            "storage": "ok",
            "authenticated": "active"
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (401):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "USER EXPIRED!!",
    "data": null,
    "code": 401,
    "errors": {
        "status": "expired"
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/connect

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Core - Metadata

Frontend bootstrap data: every model enumeration (status, type, gender, …) as { key, value, label } lists, grouped by domain. key is the UPPER_SNAKE enum identifier (stable), value the wire value, label the Vietnamese display text. Fetch once after login to populate dropdowns, status badges and filters without hardcoding option lists.

Init metadata

requires authentication

Returns the full enum catalog. Labels are in Vietnamese.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/metadata" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/metadata"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "shared": {
            "gender": [
                {
                    "key": "MALE",
                    "value": "male",
                    "label": "Nam"
                },
                {
                    "key": "FEMALE",
                    "value": "female",
                    "label": "Nữ"
                },
                {
                    "key": "OTHER",
                    "value": "other",
                    "label": "Khác"
                }
            ]
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/auth/metadata

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Core - User

Authenticated user's own profile.

Get current profile

requires authentication

Shows the profile of the logged-in user. Requires a bearer token and a device-code header.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/profile" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Device-code: {your-device-code}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/api/auth/profile"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Device-code": "{your-device-code}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "username": "super",
        "full_name": "John Doe",
        "email": "super@example.com",
        "status": "active",
        "role": "admin",
        "role_name": "Administrator",
        "access_id": 123
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (401):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "No permision!!",
    "data": null,
    "code": 401,
    "errors": []
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Example: application/json

Education - Assignment

Create, publish, assign, collect and grade student assignments (assignment.md).

requires authentication

curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/assignment/list" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/assignment/list"
);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

GET v1/edu/assignment/detail/{id}

Headers

Authorization

Create assignment

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/assignment/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"assignment_name\": \"Unit 1 Homework\",
    \"assignment_type\": \"homework\",
    \"instruction\": \"Hoàn thành bài tập trang 10.\",
    \"max_score\": 10,
    \"due_date\": \"2026-07-10 23:59:00\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/assignment/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "assignment_name": "Unit 1 Homework",
    "assignment_type": "homework",
    "instruction": "Hoàn thành bài tập trang 10.",
    "max_score": 10,
    "due_date": "2026-07-10 23:59:00"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "code": 401,
    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],
    "data": null
}

Request failed with error:
