Request      

POST v1/edu/assignment/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

assignment_name   string     

Assignment name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Unit 1 Homework

assignment_type   string     

Type: homework, worksheet, quiz, writing, speaking, listening, reading, project, exam_practice. Example: homework

Must be one of:
  • homework
  • worksheet
  • quiz
  • writing
  • speaking
  • listening
  • reading
  • project
  • exam_practice
instruction   string     

Instruction for students. Must not be greater than 10000 characters. Example: Hoàn thành bài tập trang 10.

max_score   number     

Maximum score (> 0). Example: 10

due_date   string     

Due date (Y-m-d H:i:s), must be in the future. Must be a valid date. Must be a date after now. Example: 2026-07-10 23:59:00

Update assignment

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/assignment/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"assignment_name\": \"Unit 1 Homework\",
    \"assignment_type\": \"homework\",
    \"course_id\": 17,
    \"level_id\": 17,
    \"lesson_id\": 17,
    \"class_room_id\": 17,
    \"description\": \"Dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"instruction\": \"Hoàn thành bài tập trang 10.\",
    \"max_score\": 10,
    \"due_date\": \"2026-07-10 23:59:00\",
    \"allow_late_submission\": false,
    \"allow_multiple_submission\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/assignment/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "assignment_name": "Unit 1 Homework",
    "assignment_type": "homework",
    "course_id": 17,
    "level_id": 17,
    "lesson_id": 17,
    "class_room_id": 17,
    "description": "Dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "instruction": "Hoàn thành bài tập trang 10.",
    "max_score": 10,
    "due_date": "2026-07-10 23:59:00",
    "allow_late_submission": false,
    "allow_multiple_submission": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "code": 401,
    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],
    "data": null
}

Request      

PUT v1/edu/assignment/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The assignment ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

assignment_name   string  optional    

Assignment name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Unit 1 Homework

assignment_type   string  optional    

Assignment type. Example: homework

Must be one of:
  • homework
  • worksheet
  • quiz
  • writing
  • speaking
  • listening
  • reading
  • project
  • exam_practice
course_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

level_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

lesson_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

class_room_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

description   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

instruction   string  optional    

Instruction for students. Must not be greater than 10000 characters. Example: Hoàn thành bài tập trang 10.

max_score   number  optional    

Maximum score (> 0). Example: 10

due_date   string  optional    

Due date (Y-m-d H:i:s). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-07-10 23:59:00

allow_late_submission   boolean  optional    

Allow submitting after the due date. Example: false

allow_multiple_submission   boolean  optional    

Allow re-submission. Example: false

Assign by class

requires authentication

Assigns to every active student of a class, seeding an ASSIGNED submission per student (BR004).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/assignment/assign/class/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"class_room_id\": 1
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/assignment/assign/class/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "class_room_id": 1
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Assign by student

requires authentication

Assigns to an explicit list of students, seeding an ASSIGNED submission per student (BR004).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/assignment/assign/student/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"student_ids\": [
        17
    ]
}"

);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "student_ids": [

    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Submit an assignment

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/assignment/submit/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"student_id\": 1,
    \"answer\": \"My family has four people...\",
    \"files\": [
        {
            \"file_id\": 10,
            \"file_name\": \"homework.pdf\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/assignment/submit/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "student_id": 1,
    "answer": "My family has four people...",
    "files": [
        {
            "file_id": 10,
            "file_name": "homework.pdf"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST v1/edu/assignment/submit/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The assignment ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

student_id   integer     

Submitting student id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

answer   string  optional    

Online text answer. Must not be greater than 20000 characters. Example: My family has four people...

files   object[]  optional    

Uploaded files (array of {file_id, file_name}).
file_id   integer     

Must be at least 1. Example: 73

file_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

Education - Assignment Submission

Grade and publish results of student submissions (assignment.md §9, §10).

Grade a submission

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/submission/grade/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"score\": 9,
    \"comment\": \"Làm tốt, cần chú ý ngữ pháp.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/submission/grade/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "score": 9,
    "comment": "Làm tốt, cần chú ý ngữ pháp."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *

Request      

POST v1/edu/submission/grade/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The submission ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

score   number     

Score (must not exceed the assignment max score). Must be at least 0. Example: 9

comment   string  optional    

Teacher comment. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Làm tốt, cần chú ý ngữ pháp.

Education - Class

Manage classes (lớp học) — the core operational unit linking courses, students, teachers, rooms, curriculum and attendance.

List classes

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/list?search=IELTS&course_id=1&teacher_id=2&assignee_id=5&weekday=2&shift=evening&status=active&start_from=2026-07-01&start_to=2026-12-31&sort_by=start_date&sort_dir=asc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "IELTS",
    "course_id": "1",
    "teacher_id": "2",
    "assignee_id": "5",
    "weekday": "2",
    "shift": "evening",
    "status": "active",
    "start_from": "2026-07-01",
    "start_to": "2026-12-31",
    "sort_by": "start_date",
    "sort_dir": "asc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Request      

GET v1/edu/class-room/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by class name or code. Example: IELTS

course_id   integer  optional    

Filter by course ID. Example: 1

teacher_id   integer  optional    

Filter by teacher ID. Example: 2

assignee_id   integer  optional    

Filter by assignee (staff) user ID. Example: 5

weekday   integer  optional    

Filter by schedule weekday (1=Mon … 7=Sun). Example: 2

shift   string  optional    

Filter by shift (schedule start time): morning, afternoon, evening. Example: evening

status   string  optional    

Filter by status: draft, upcoming, active, suspended, completed. Example: active

start_from   string  optional    

date Classes starting on or after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-07-01

start_to   string  optional    

date Classes starting on or before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: code, name, start_date, status, created_at. Example: start_date

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc (default desc). Example: asc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

Class detail

requires authentication

Returns full class information plus student, operational and financial statistics.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/detail/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Create class

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"IELTS Foundation - Khai giảng tháng 7\",
    \"code\": \"IELTS-F-2026-07\",
    \"course_id\": 1,
    \"lesson_plan_id\": 17,
    \"assignee_id\": 5,
    \"teacher_id\": 2,
    \"room_id\": 3,
    \"learning_type\": \"scheduled\",
    \"start_date\": \"2026-07-01\",
    \"end_date\": \"2026-09-30\",
    \"min_warning_capacity\": 5,
    \"min_capacity\": 8,
    \"max_warning_capacity\": 18,
    \"max_capacity\": 20,
    \"use_course_curriculum\": true,
    \"description\": \"Dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"business_id\": 17,
    \"schedules\": [
        {
            \"weekday\": 2,
            \"start_time\": \"19:00\",
            \"end_time\": \"20:30\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "IELTS Foundation - Khai giảng tháng 7",
    "code": "IELTS-F-2026-07",
    "course_id": 1,
    "lesson_plan_id": 17,
    "assignee_id": 5,
    "teacher_id": 2,
    "room_id": 3,
    "learning_type": "scheduled",
    "start_date": "2026-07-01",
    "end_date": "2026-09-30",
    "min_warning_capacity": 5,
    "min_capacity": 8,
    "max_warning_capacity": 18,
    "max_capacity": 20,
    "use_course_curriculum": true,
    "description": "Dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "business_id": 17,
    "schedules": [
        {
            "weekday": 2,
            "start_time": "19:00",
            "end_time": "20:30"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST v1/edu/class-room/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Tên lớp học. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: IELTS Foundation - Khai giảng tháng 7

code   string     

Mã lớp (duy nhất). Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: IELTS-F-2026-07

course_id   integer     

ID khóa học. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

lesson_plan_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

assignee_id   integer  optional    

ID nhân viên phụ trách (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 5

teacher_id   integer  optional    

ID giáo viên phụ trách (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 2

room_id   integer  optional    

ID phòng học (optional). Example: 3

learning_type   string     

Hình thức học: scheduled | self_learning | flexible. Example: scheduled

Must be one of:
  • scheduled
  • self_learning
  • flexible
start_date   string     

Ngày khai giảng (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-07-01

end_date   string  optional    

Ngày kết thúc dự kiến (Y-m-d, optional). Must be a valid date. Must be a date after start_date. Example: 2026-09-30

min_warning_capacity   integer  optional    

Sĩ số cảnh báo tối thiểu. Must be at least 0. Example: 5

min_capacity   integer  optional    

Sĩ số tối thiểu. Must be at least 0. Example: 8

max_warning_capacity   integer  optional    

Sĩ số cảnh báo tối đa. Must be at least 0. Example: 18

max_capacity   integer  optional    

Sĩ số tối đa. Must be at least 1. Example: 20

use_course_curriculum   boolean  optional    

Sao chép chương trình học từ khóa học mẫu. Example: true

description   string  optional    

Mô tả lớp học. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

business_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

schedules   object[]  optional    

Danh sách lịch học (array).
weekday   integer     

Must be between 1 and 7. Example: 1

start_time   string     

Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 00:32

end_time   string     

Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Must be a date after schedules.*.start_time. Example: 2107-07-23

Update class

requires authentication

Partial update — only send fields to change. Code and course_id are immutable once sessions exist.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"IELTS Foundation - Khai giảng tháng 7\",
    \"lesson_plan_id\": 17,
    \"assignee_id\": 5,
    \"teacher_id\": 2,
    \"room_id\": 17,
    \"learning_type\": \"scheduled\",
    \"start_date\": \"2026-06-24T00:32:32\",
    \"end_date\": \"2107-07-23\",
    \"min_warning_capacity\": 45,
    \"min_capacity\": 56,
    \"max_warning_capacity\": 16,
    \"max_capacity\": 51,
    \"description\": \"Eius est dolor dolores minus voluptatem quisquam.\",
    \"schedules\": [
        {
            \"weekday\": 2,
            \"start_time\": \"19:00\",
            \"end_time\": \"20:30\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "IELTS Foundation - Khai giảng tháng 7",
    "lesson_plan_id": 17,
    "assignee_id": 5,
    "teacher_id": 2,
    "room_id": 17,
    "learning_type": "scheduled",
    "start_date": "2026-06-24T00:32:32",
    "end_date": "2107-07-23",
    "min_warning_capacity": 45,
    "min_capacity": 56,
    "max_warning_capacity": 16,
    "max_capacity": 51,
    "description": "Eius est dolor dolores minus voluptatem quisquam.",
    "schedules": [
        {
            "weekday": 2,
            "start_time": "19:00",
            "end_time": "20:30"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật lớp học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "IELTS-F-2026-07",
        "name": "IELTS Foundation (cập nhật)",
        "status": "upcoming",
        "updated_at": "2026-06-13T09:00:00.000000Z"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

PUT v1/edu/class-room/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The class ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Tên lớp học. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: IELTS Foundation - Khai giảng tháng 7

lesson_plan_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

assignee_id   integer  optional    

ID nhân viên phụ trách. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 5

teacher_id   integer  optional    

ID giáo viên phụ trách. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 2

room_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

learning_type   string  optional    

Example: scheduled

Must be one of:
  • scheduled
  • self_learning
  • flexible
start_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-24T00:32:32

end_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after start_date. Example: 2107-07-23

min_warning_capacity   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 45

min_capacity   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 56

max_warning_capacity   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 16

max_capacity   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 51

description   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Eius est dolor dolores minus voluptatem quisquam.

schedules   object[]  optional    

Toàn bộ lịch học mới (thay thế lịch cũ). Null = giữ nguyên.
weekday   integer     

Must be between 1 and 7. Example: 2

start_time   string     

Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 00:32

end_time   string     

Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Must be a date after schedules.*.start_time. Example: 2107-07-23

Suspend class

requires authentication

Moves the class to "suspended" status and records the reason.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/suspend/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Giáo viên nghỉ bệnh dài hạn.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/suspend/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Giáo viên nghỉ bệnh dài hạn."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạm ngừng lớp học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "IELTS-F-2026-07",
        "status": "suspended"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Already suspended):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Lớp học đang ở trạng thái tạm ngừng.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The class ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

reason   string     

Lý do tạm ngừng lớp học. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: Giáo viên nghỉ bệnh dài hạn.

Restore class

requires authentication

Reactivates a suspended class back to upcoming or active based on start date.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/restore/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/restore/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Add schedule to a class

requires authentication

curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/1/schedule/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"weekday\": 2,
    \"start_time\": \"19:00\",
    \"end_time\": \"20:30\"
}"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/1/schedule/create"
);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "weekday": 2,
    "start_time": "19:00",
    "end_time": "20:30"
};

Body Parameters

Giờ bắt đầu (HH:MM). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 19:00

end_time   string     

Giờ kết thúc (HH:MM). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Must be a date after start_time. Example: 20:30

Education - Class Session

Manage sessions (buổi học) — the operational unit of a class, linking attendance, teachers, revenue, tags and feedback.

List sessions of a class

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/1/session/list?search=Bu%E1%BB%95i+1&status=upcoming&teacher_id=2&room_id=4&date_from=2026-07-01&date_to=2026-07-31&tag_ids[]=1&tag_ids[]=2&sort_by=session_date&sort_dir=asc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/1/session/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "Buổi 1",
    "status": "upcoming",
    "teacher_id": "2",
    "room_id": "4",
    "date_from": "2026-07-01",
    "date_to": "2026-07-31",
    "tag_ids[0]": "1",
    "tag_ids[1]": "2",
    "sort_by": "session_date",
    "sort_dir": "asc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "class_id": 1,
                "session_no": 1,
                "code": "IELTS-F-2026-07-B01",
                "name": "Buổi 1 - Introduction",
                "session_date": "2026-07-02",
                "start_time": "19:00",
                "end_time": "20:30",
                "room_id": 4,
                "teacher_id": 2,
                "substitute_teacher_id": null,
                "status": "upcoming",
                "attendance_locked": false,
                "revenue_amount": "0.00",
                "note": null,
                "tags": []
            }
        ],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 1,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/edu/class-room/{classId}/session/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

classId   integer     

The class ID. Example: 1

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by session name or code. Example: Buổi 1

status   string  optional    

Filter by status: upcoming, ongoing, completed, cancelled. Example: upcoming

teacher_id   integer  optional    

Filter by teacher ID. Example: 2

room_id   integer  optional    

Filter by room ID. Example: 4

date_from   string  optional    

date Sessions on or after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-07-01

date_to   string  optional    

date Sessions on or before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-07-31

tag_ids   string[]  optional    

Filter by tag IDs.

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: session_no, name, session_date, start_time, status, created_at. Example: session_date

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc. Example: asc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

Create session

requires authentication

Creates a single session for the class (spec §5). Rejected when it overlaps another session sharing the class, teacher or room at the same time.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/1/session/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"Buổi 1 - Introduction\",
    \"session_date\": \"2026-07-02\",
    \"start_time\": \"19:00\",
    \"end_time\": \"20:30\",
    \"teacher_id\": 2,
    \"substitute_teacher_id\": 3,
    \"room_id\": 4,
    \"note\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"tag_ids\": [
        17
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/1/session/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "Buổi 1 - Introduction",
    "session_date": "2026-07-02",
    "start_time": "19:00",
    "end_time": "20:30",
    "teacher_id": 2,
    "substitute_teacher_id": 3,
    "room_id": 4,
    "note": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "tag_ids": [
        17
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo buổi học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "class_id": 1,
        "session_no": 1,
        "name": "Buổi 1 - Introduction",
        "status": "upcoming"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Schedule conflict):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Trùng lịch: phòng học, giáo viên hoặc lớp học đã có buổi trong khung giờ này.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/class-room/{classId}/session/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

classId   integer     

The class ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string     

Tên buổi học. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Buổi 1 - Introduction

session_date   string     

Ngày học (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-07-02

start_time   string     

Giờ bắt đầu (HH:MM). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 19:00

end_time   string     

Giờ kết thúc (HH:MM). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Must be a date after start_time. Example: 20:30

teacher_id   integer  optional    

ID giáo viên giảng dạy (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 2

substitute_teacher_id   integer  optional    

ID giáo viên dạy thay (optional). The value and teacher_id must be different. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 3

room_id   integer  optional    

ID phòng học (optional). Example: 4

note   string  optional    

Ghi chú (optional). Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

tag_ids   integer[]  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

Generate sessions

requires authentication

Bulk-generates sessions from the class schedules over a date range (spec §6). Existing sessions (same class, date and start time) are skipped.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/1/session/generate" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"from_date\": \"2026-07-01\",
    \"to_date\": \"2026-09-30\",
    \"override\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-room/1/session/generate"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "from_date": "2026-07-01",
    "to_date": "2026-09-30",
    "override": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Sinh buổi học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "created": 24,
        "skipped": 0
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/class-room/{classId}/session/generate

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

classId   integer     

The class ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

from_date   string     

Sinh buổi học từ ngày (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-07-01

to_date   string     

Sinh buổi học đến ngày (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to from_date. Example: 2026-09-30

override   boolean  optional    

Ghi đè (xóa) các buổi chưa chốt điểm danh trong khoảng ngày trước khi sinh. Example: false

Request      

GET v1/edu/class-session/detail/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The session ID. Example: 1

Update session

requires authentication

Partial update of time, teacher, substitute teacher, room, tags or note (spec §7). Blocked once attendance is locked.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-session/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"Buổi 1 - Introduction\",
    \"session_date\": \"2026-07-02\",
    \"start_time\": \"19:00\",
    \"end_time\": \"20:30\",
    \"teacher_id\": 2,
    \"substitute_teacher_id\": 3,
    \"room_id\": 4,
    \"note\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"tag_ids\": [
        17
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-session/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "Buổi 1 - Introduction",
    "session_date": "2026-07-02",
    "start_time": "19:00",
    "end_time": "20:30",
    "teacher_id": 2,
    "substitute_teacher_id": 3,
    "room_id": 4,
    "note": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "tag_ids": [
        17
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật buổi học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Buổi 1 - Introduction",
        "status": "upcoming"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Attendance locked):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Buổi học đã chốt điểm danh, không thể cập nhật.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT v1/edu/class-session/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The session ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Tên buổi học. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Buổi 1 - Introduction

session_date   string  optional    

Ngày học (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-07-02

start_time   string  optional    

Giờ bắt đầu (HH:MM). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 19:00

end_time   string  optional    

Giờ kết thúc (HH:MM). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Must be a date after start_time. Example: 20:30

teacher_id   integer  optional    

ID giáo viên giảng dạy. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 2

substitute_teacher_id   integer  optional    

ID giáo viên dạy thay. The value and teacher_id must be different. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 3

room_id   integer  optional    

ID phòng học. Example: 4

note   string  optional    

Ghi chú. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

tag_ids   integer[]  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

Cancel session

requires authentication

Marks the session as cancelled with a reason (spec §11). No revenue or attendance is recorded.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-session/cancel/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Giáo viên nghỉ đột xuất.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/class-session/cancel/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Giáo viên nghỉ đột xuất."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Hủy buổi học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "cancelled"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Already cancelled):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Buổi học đã được hủy.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

POST v1/edu/class-session/cancel/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer

Body Parameters

reason   string     

Lý do hủy buổi học. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: Giáo viên nghỉ đột xuất.

Education - Course

Manage courses (training catalogue).

List courses

requires authentication

Paginated list of courses for the current business.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/course/list?search=IELTS&status=active&is_active=1&duration_min=60&duration_max=120&price_min=100000&price_max=500000&created_by=1&created_from=2026-01-01&created_to=2026-12-31&sort_by=created_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/course/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "IELTS",
    "status": "active",
    "is_active": "1",
    "duration_min": "60",
    "duration_max": "120",
    "price_min": "100000",
    "price_max": "500000",
    "created_by": "1",
    "created_from": "2026-01-01",
    "created_to": "2026-12-31",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "code": "CRS001",
                "name": "IELTS Foundation",
                "thumbnail": null,
                "duration_minutes": 90,
                "price_per_lesson": 200000,
                "description": "Beginner IELTS course",
                "is_active": true,
                "business_id": 1,
                "created_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z",
                "updated_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z",
                "deleted_at": null
            }
        ],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 1,
            "per_page": 15,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/edu/course/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by course name or code. Example: IELTS

status   string  optional    

Filter by status: active or inactive. Example: active

is_active   boolean  optional    

Filter by active flag (alternative to status). Example: true

duration_min   integer  optional    

Minimum duration in minutes. Example: 60

duration_max   integer  optional    

Maximum duration in minutes. Example: 120

price_min   number  optional    

Minimum price per lesson. Example: 100000

price_max   number  optional    

Maximum price per lesson. Example: 500000

created_by   integer  optional    

Filter by creator user id. Example: 1

created_from   string  optional    

date Created on or after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-01-01

created_to   string  optional    

date Created on or before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: code, name, duration_minutes, price_per_lesson, created_at. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

Create course

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/course/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"IELTS Foundation\",
    \"code\": \"IELTS_6_5\",
    \"thumbnail\": \"https:\\/\\/cdn.hana.edu.vn\\/c.png\",
    \"duration_minutes\": 90,
    \"price_per_lesson\": 250000,
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"is_active\": true,
    \"business_id\": 1
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/course/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "IELTS Foundation",
    "code": "IELTS_6_5",
    "thumbnail": "https:\/\/cdn.hana.edu.vn\/c.png",
    "duration_minutes": 90,
    "price_per_lesson": 250000,
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "is_active": true,
    "business_id": 1
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST v1/edu/course/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Course name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: IELTS Foundation

code   string     

Unique code (A-Z, 0-9, ). Must match the regex /^[A-Z0-9]+$/. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: IELTS_6_5

thumbnail   string  optional    

Thumbnail URL. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: https://cdn.hana.edu.vn/c.png

duration_minutes   integer     

Lesson duration in minutes (> 0). Must be at least 1. Example: 90

price_per_lesson   number     

Price per lesson (>= 0). Must be at least 0. Example: 250000

description   string  optional    

Description. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

is_active   boolean  optional    

Active state. Example: true

business_id   integer  optional    

Owning business id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

requires authentication

    \"price_per_lesson\": 250000,

requires authentication

curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/course/suspend/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Tạm dừng tuyển sinh\"
}"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/course/suspend/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Tạm dừng tuyển sinh"
};

    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "average": 4.6,
        "count": 25
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

GET v1/edu/course/rating-summary/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The course ID. Example: 1

Education - Enrollment

Manage enrollments (ghi danh) — the "hợp đồng học tập" linking a student to a class, its lesson package, tuition, debt, transfers and suspensions.

List enrollments

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/list?search=ENR&student_id=1&course_id=1&class_id=1&sales_id=5&status=studying&enrolled_from=2026-07-01&enrolled_to=2026-12-31&has_debt=1&sort_by=enrolled_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "ENR",
    "student_id": "1",
    "course_id": "1",
    "class_id": "1",
    "sales_id": "5",
    "status": "studying",
    "enrolled_from": "2026-07-01",
    "enrolled_to": "2026-12-31",
    "has_debt": "1",
    "sort_by": "enrolled_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "code": "ENR-202607-00001",
                "status": "studying",
                "student_id": 1,
                "course_id": 1,
                "class_id": 1,
                "sales_id": 5,
                "enrolled_at": "2026-07-01",
                "total_lessons": 24,
                "completed_lessons": 0,
                "remaining_lessons": 24,
                "price_per_lesson": 250000,
                "tuition_amount": 6000000,
                "discount_amount": 600000,
                "paid_amount": 3000000,
                "debt_amount": 2400000
            }
        ],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 1,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/edu/enrollment/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by enrollment code, student name, student code or phone. Example: ENR

student_id   integer  optional    

Filter by student. Example: 1

course_id   integer  optional    

Filter by course. Example: 1

class_id   integer  optional    

Filter by class. Example: 1

sales_id   integer  optional    

Filter by consultant (staff user). Example: 5

status   string  optional    

Filter by status: pending, studying, suspended, transferred, completed, cancelled, refunded. Example: studying

enrolled_from   string  optional    

date Enrolled on or after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-07-01

enrolled_to   string  optional    

date Enrolled on or before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

has_debt   boolean  optional    

Filter by outstanding debt. Example: true

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: code, enrolled_at, status, debt_amount, created_at. Example: enrolled_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

asc or desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

Enrollment detail

requires authentication

Returns the enrollment plus learning progress, financial summary and the payment / transfer / suspension history (enrollment.md §8).

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/detail/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "enrollment": {
            "id": 1,
            "code": "ENR-202607-00001",
            "status": "studying"
        },
        "progress": {
            "total_lessons": 24,
            "completed_lessons": 0,
            "remaining_lessons": 24,
            "completion_rate": 0
        },
        "financial": {
            "tuition_amount": 6000000,
            "discount_amount": 600000,
            "paid_amount": 3000000,
            "debt_amount": 2400000,
            "refund_amount": 0
        },
        "payments": [],
        "transfers": [],
        "suspensions": []
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

Request      

GET v1/edu/enrollment/detail/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The enrollment ID. Example: 1

Create enrollment

requires authentication

Registers the student into the class and generates the invoice, payment and outstanding debt (enrollment.md §7).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"student_id\": 1,
    \"course_id\": 1,
    \"class_id\": 1,
    \"sales_id\": 5,
    \"enrolled_at\": \"2026-07-01\",
    \"total_lessons\": 24,
    \"price_per_lesson\": 250000,
    \"discount_percent\": 10,
    \"discount_amount\": 100000,
    \"bonus_lessons\": 2,
    \"paid_amount\": 3000000,
    \"payment_method\": \"cash\",
    \"note\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "student_id": 1,
    "course_id": 1,
    "class_id": 1,
    "sales_id": 5,
    "enrolled_at": "2026-07-01",
    "total_lessons": 24,
    "price_per_lesson": 250000,
    "discount_percent": 10,
    "discount_amount": 100000,
    "bonus_lessons": 2,
    "paid_amount": 3000000,
    "payment_method": "cash",
    "note": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Ghi danh thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "ENR-202607-00001",
        "status": "studying",
        "debt_amount": 2400000
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Business rule violation):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Học viên đã có ghi danh đang hoạt động ở lớp này.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/enrollment/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

student_id   integer     

ID học viên. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

course_id   integer     

ID khóa học. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

class_id   integer     

ID lớp học (phải thuộc khóa học đã chọn). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

sales_id   integer  optional    

ID nhân viên tư vấn (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 5

enrolled_at   string  optional    

Ngày ghi danh (Y-m-d, mặc định hôm nay). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-07-01

total_lessons   integer     

Số buổi học đăng ký. Must be at least 1. Example: 24

price_per_lesson   number     

Đơn giá mỗi buổi. Must be at least 0. Example: 250000

discount_percent   number  optional    

Giảm theo phần trăm (0–100). Must be between 0 and 100. Example: 10

discount_amount   number  optional    

Giảm trực tiếp (số tiền). Must be at least 0. Example: 100000

bonus_lessons   integer  optional    

Số buổi học tặng thêm. Must be at least 0. Example: 2

paid_amount   number  optional    

Số tiền đã thanh toán ngay khi ghi danh. Must be at least 0. Example: 3000000

payment_method   string  optional    

Phương thức thanh toán (cash, transfer…). Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: cash

note   string  optional    

Ghi chú. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

Update enrollment

requires authentication

Partial update — only the consultant and note are editable.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"sales_id\": 5,
    \"note\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "sales_id": 5,
    "note": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật ghi danh thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "ENR-202607-00001",
        "note": "Đã liên hệ phụ huynh."
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT v1/edu/enrollment/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The enrollment ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

sales_id   integer  optional    

ID nhân viên tư vấn. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 5

note   string  optional    

Ghi chú. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

Suspend enrollment

requires authentication

Reserves (bảo lưu) the enrollment. Rejected when no lessons remain (enrollment.md §9).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/suspend/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"start_date\": \"2026-08-01\",
    \"end_date\": \"2026-09-01\",
    \"reason\": \"Học viên đi công tác.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/suspend/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "start_date": "2026-08-01",
    "end_date": "2026-09-01",
    "reason": "Học viên đi công tác."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Bảo lưu ghi danh thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "suspended"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, No lessons remaining):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Không thể bảo lưu khi không còn buổi học.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/enrollment/suspend/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The enrollment ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

start_date   string     

Ngày bắt đầu bảo lưu (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-08-01

end_date   string     

Ngày kết thúc bảo lưu (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to start_date. Example: 2026-09-01

reason   string     

Lý do bảo lưu. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: Học viên đi công tác.

Transfer enrollment

requires authentication

Moves the student to another class of the same course (enrollment.md §10).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/transfer/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"to_class_id\": 2,
    \"transfer_date\": \"2026-08-15\",
    \"reason\": \"Đổi lịch học.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/transfer/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "to_class_id": 2,
    "transfer_date": "2026-08-15",
    "reason": "Đổi lịch học."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Chuyển lớp thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "class_id": 2,
        "status": "studying"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Different course):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Lớp đích phải cùng khóa học.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/enrollment/transfer/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The enrollment ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

to_class_id   integer     

ID lớp đích (cùng khóa học, còn chỗ trống). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 2

transfer_date   string     

Ngày chuyển lớp (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-08-15

reason   string  optional    

Lý do chuyển lớp. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: Đổi lịch học.

Refund enrollment

requires authentication

Refunds unused lessons (remaining × price per lesson) and closes the enrollment (enrollment.md §11).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/refund/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/refund/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Hoàn phí thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "refunded",
        "remaining_lessons": 0
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, No lessons remaining):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Không còn buổi học để hoàn phí.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

Cancel enrollment

requires authentication

Cancels the enrollment and removes the student from the class (enrollment.md §12).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/cancel/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Học viên không tiếp tục.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/enrollment/cancel/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Học viên không tiếp tục."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Hủy ghi danh thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "cancelled"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Education - Exam

Manage the exam bank and its questions (exam.md §VI, §VII).

curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam/list" \

    "Content-Type": "application/json",

};

Create exam

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"exam_name\": \"Final Test - Starter\",
    \"exam_type\": \"final\",
    \"course_id\": 1,
    \"level_id\": 1,
    \"duration\": 60,
    \"total_score\": 100,
    \"passing_score\": 70
}"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam/create"
);

Request      

POST v1/edu/exam/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

exam_name   string     

Exam name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Final Test - Starter

exam_type   string     

Type: placement, progress, midterm, final, promotion, mock_test, certification. Example: final

Must be one of:
  • placement
  • progress
  • midterm
  • final
  • promotion
  • mock_test
  • certification
course_id   integer  optional    

Owning course (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

level_id   integer  optional    

Owning level (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

duration   integer     

Duration in minutes (> 0). Example: 60

total_score   number     

Maximum total score (> 0). Example: 100

passing_score   number     

Minimum score to pass (<= total_score). Example: 70

Update exam

requires authentication

Editing an exam already in use (published or with a scheduled session) leaves it untouched and returns a new draft version within its lineage; drafts are updated in place (exam.md §IV "Version đề thi").

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"exam_name\": \"Final Test - Starter\",
    \"exam_type\": \"final\",
    \"course_id\": 1,
    \"level_id\": 1,
    \"duration\": 60,
    \"total_score\": 100,
    \"passing_score\": 70,
    \"status\": \"published\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "exam_name": "Final Test - Starter",
    "exam_type": "final",
    "course_id": 1,
    "level_id": 1,
    "duration": 60,
    "total_score": 100,
    "passing_score": 70,
    "status": "published"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "code": 401,
    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],
    "data": null
}

You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

PUT v1/edu/exam/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The exam ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

exam_name   string  optional    

Exam name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Final Test - Starter

exam_type   string  optional    

Type: placement, progress, midterm, final, promotion, mock_test, certification. Example: final

Must be one of:
  • placement
  • progress
  • midterm
  • final
  • promotion
  • mock_test
  • certification
course_id   integer  optional    

Owning course (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

level_id   integer  optional    

Owning level (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

duration   integer  optional    

Duration in minutes (> 0). Example: 60

total_score   number  optional    

Maximum total score (> 0). Example: 100

passing_score   number  optional    

Minimum score to pass. Example: 70

status   string  optional    

Status: draft, published, archived. Example: published

Must be one of:
  • draft
  • published
  • archived

Clone exam

requires authentication

Clones the exam (and its questions) into a brand-new, standalone draft at version 1.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam/clone/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam/clone/1"
);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

requires authentication

curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam/question/create/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \

    --data "{
    \"skill\": \"reading\",
    \"question_type\": \"single_choice\",
    \"content\": \"What is the capital of France?\",
    \"answer_key\": [
        \"A\"
    ],
    \"score\": 2,
    \"difficulty\": \"medium\"
}"

);

Request      

POST v1/edu/exam/question/create/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The exam ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

skill   string     

Skill: listening, speaking, reading, writing, grammar, vocabulary. Example: reading

Must be one of:
  • listening
  • speaking
  • reading
  • writing
  • grammar
  • vocabulary
question_type   string     

Type: single_choice, multiple_choice, fill_blank, matching, essay, speaking, listening. Example: single_choice

Must be one of:
  • single_choice
  • multiple_choice
  • fill_blank
  • matching
  • essay
  • speaking
  • listening
content   string     

Question content. Example: What is the capital of France?

answer_key   object  optional    

Answer key (array; shape depends on type).

score   number     

Score awarded for this question. Example: 2

difficulty   string  optional    

Difficulty: easy, medium, hard. Example: medium

Must be one of:
  • easy
  • medium
  • hard

Education - Exam Result

Grade sittings, publish results and promote on a passing result (exam.md §XI–§XIII). The {id} path parameter is the exam registration ID (a candidate's slot in a sitting).

Grade a result

requires authentication

Records per-skill scores for a registered candidate; the total is capped at the exam's maximum (BR006).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-result/grade/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"listening_score\": 20,
    \"speaking_score\": 15,
    \"reading_score\": 20,
    \"writing_score\": 15,
    \"grammar_score\": 15,
    \"vocabulary_score\": 15
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-result/grade/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "listening_score": 20,
    "speaking_score": 15,
    "reading_score": 20,
    "writing_score": 15,
    "grammar_score": 15,
    "vocabulary_score": 15
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *

Promote on result

requires authentication

Promotes the candidate to the next level on a passing result (BR008) and records the transition in the student's level history.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-result/promote/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"target_level_id\": 2,
    \"reason\": \"Đạt điểm xét lên cấp.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-result/promote/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "target_level_id": 2,
    "reason": "Đạt điểm xét lên cấp."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST v1/edu/exam-result/promote/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The exam registration ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

target_level_id   integer  optional    

Explicit target level (optional; defaults to the next level). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 2

reason   string  optional    

Reason for the promotion. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: Đạt điểm xét lên cấp.

Education - Exam Session

GET v1/edu/exam-session/detail/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

id   integer

Create exam session

requires authentication

Enforces room/invigilator non-conflict (BR001, BR002).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-session/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"exam_id\": 1,
    \"class_room_id\": 1,
    \"room_id\": 1,
    \"teacher_id\": 1,
    \"exam_date\": \"2026-07-15\",
    \"start_time\": \"09:00\",
    \"end_time\": \"10:30\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-session/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "exam_id": 1,
    "class_room_id": 1,
    "room_id": 1,
    "teacher_id": 1,
    "exam_date": "2026-07-15",
    "start_time": "09:00",
    "end_time": "10:30"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "code": 401,
    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],
    "data": null
}

Request      

POST v1/edu/exam-session/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

exam_id   integer     

Exam this sitting runs. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

class_room_id   integer  optional    

Class to seat (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

room_id   integer  optional    

Physical room (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

teacher_id   integer  optional    

Invigilator (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

exam_date   string     

Exam date (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-07-15

start_time   string     

Start time (H:i). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 09:00

end_time   string     

End time (H:i), after start_time. Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Must be a date after start_time. Example: 10:30

Update exam session

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-session/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"class_room_id\": 1,
    \"room_id\": 1,
    \"teacher_id\": 1,
    \"exam_date\": \"2026-07-15\",
    \"start_time\": \"09:00\",
    \"end_time\": \"10:30\",
    \"status\": \"closed\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-session/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "class_room_id": 1,
    "room_id": 1,
    "teacher_id": 1,
    "exam_date": "2026-07-15",
    "start_time": "09:00",
    "end_time": "10:30",
    "status": "closed"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

PUT v1/edu/exam-session/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The exam session ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

class_room_id   integer  optional    

Class to seat (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

room_id   integer  optional    

Physical room (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

teacher_id   integer  optional    

Invigilator (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

exam_date   string  optional    

Exam date (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-07-15

start_time   string  optional    

Start time (H:i). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 09:00

end_time   string  optional    

End time (H:i), after start_time. Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Must be a date after start_time. Example: 10:30

status   string  optional    

Status: scheduled, in_progress, closed. Example: closed

Must be one of:
  • scheduled
  • in_progress
  • closed

Register a class

requires authentication

Auto-registers every active student of a class (BR004; rejected if the sitting is closed, BR005).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-session/register/class/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"class_room_id\": 1
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-session/register/class/1"
);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "class_room_id": 1
};

    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
