Register students

requires authentication

Manually registers a list of students (BR004; rejected if the sitting is closed, BR005).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-session/register/student/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"student_ids\": [
        17
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam-session/register/student/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "student_ids": [
        17
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Education - Exam Versions

Manage an exam's version lineage (exam.md §IV "Version đề thi").

List versions of an exam

requires authentication

Lists every version in the exam's lineage, oldest first.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/exam/version/list/1" \

Education - Lesson

Manage the actual per-class lessons generated from a lesson plan.

List lessons

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson/list?search=Family&class_room_id=1&teacher_id=1&room_id=1&branch_id=1&status=scheduled&lesson_date=2026-07-01&date_from=2026-07-01&date_to=2026-07-31&sort_by=lesson_date&per_page=20" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "Family",
    "class_room_id": "1",
    "teacher_id": "1",
    "room_id": "1",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "status": "scheduled",
    "lesson_date": "2026-07-01",
    "date_from": "2026-07-01",
    "date_to": "2026-07-31",
    "sort_by": "lesson_date",
    "per_page": "20",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "class_room_id": 1,
                "lesson_no": 1,
                "lesson_title": "Alphabet",
                "lesson_date": "2026-07-01",
                "status": "scheduled"
            }
        ],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 1,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/edu/lesson/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by lesson title. Example: Family

class_room_id   integer  optional    

Filter by class. Example: 1

teacher_id   integer  optional    

Filter by teacher. Example: 1

room_id   integer  optional    

Filter by room. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by branch (via room). Example: 1

status   string  optional    

Filter by status. Example: scheduled

lesson_date   string  optional    

date Filter by exact date (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-07-01

date_from   string  optional    

date Lessons on or after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-07-01

date_to   string  optional    

date Lessons on or before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-07-31

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: lesson_no, lesson_date, start_time, status, created_at. Example: lesson_date

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size (default 20). Example: 20

Lesson detail

requires authentication

Returns the lesson with teaching content and change history.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson/detail/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "lesson": {
            "id": 1,
            "lesson_no": 1,
            "lesson_title": "Alphabet",
            "status": "scheduled",
            "histories": []
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Generate lessons for a class from its lesson plan

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson/generate/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"from_date\": \"2026-07-01\",
    \"override\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson/generate/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "from_date": "2026-07-01",
    "override": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

    "success": true,
    "msg": "Sinh buổi học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "created": 20,
        "skipped": 0
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

POST v1/edu/lesson/generate/{classId}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

classId   integer     

The class ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

from_date   string     

Generate lessons starting from this date (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-07-01

override   boolean  optional    

Delete existing non-completed/locked lessons before generating. Example: false

Update a lesson

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"teacher_id\": 2,
    \"lesson_note\": \"Học viên tiếp thu tốt.\"
}"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "teacher_id": 2,
    "lesson_note": "Học viên tiếp thu tốt."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Authorization

Reschedule a lesson

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson/reschedule/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"lesson_date\": \"2026-07-05\",
    \"start_time\": \"09:00\",
    \"end_time\": \"11:00\",
    \"room_id\": 2
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson/reschedule/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "lesson_date": "2026-07-05",
    "start_time": "09:00",
    "end_time": "11:00",
    "room_id": 2
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Đổi lịch buổi học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "lesson_date": "2026-07-05",
        "start_time": "09:00:00",
        "end_time": "11:00:00"
    },

Request      

POST v1/edu/lesson/reschedule/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The lesson ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

lesson_date   string     

New date (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-07-05

start_time   string     

New start time (H:i). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 09:00

end_time   string     

New end time (H:i). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Must be a date after start_time. Example: 11:00

room_id   integer  optional    

New room id (defaults to current). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 2

Cancel a lesson

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson/cancel/1" \

    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \

}"

);

const headers = {

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Giáo viên nghỉ ốm"
};

    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Education - Lesson Plan

Manage teaching lesson plans (templates) per course and level.

List lesson plans

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/list?search=Kids&course_id=1&level_id=1&status=published&sort_by=created_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "Kids",
    "course_id": "1",
    "level_id": "1",
    "status": "published",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "plan_code": "KIDS_STARTER_V1",
                "plan_name": "Kids Starter",
                "course_id": 1,
                "version": 1,
                "total_lessons": 4,
                "status": "draft"
            }
        ],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 1,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/edu/lesson-plan/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by plan code or name. Example: Kids

course_id   integer  optional    

Filter by course. Example: 1

level_id   integer  optional    

Filter by level. Example: 1

status   string  optional    

Filter by status: draft, reviewing, published, archived. Example: published

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: plan_code, plan_name, version, total_lessons, status, created_at. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc. Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size (default 20). Example: 20

Lesson plan detail

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \

    --header "Accept: application/json"

);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "data": {
        "plan": {
            "id": 1,
            "plan_code": "KIDS_STARTER_V1",
            "plan_name": "Kids Starter",
            "version": 1,
            "total_lessons": 1,
            "status": "draft",
            "lessons": [
                {
                    "id": 1,
                    "lesson_no": 1,
                    "lesson_title": "Alphabet"
                }

Create lesson plan

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"plan_code\": \"KIDS_STARTER_V1\",
    \"plan_name\": \"Kids Starter\",
    \"course_id\": 1,
    \"level_id\": 1,
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "plan_code": "KIDS_STARTER_V1",
    "plan_name": "Kids Starter",
    "course_id": 1,
    "level_id": 1,
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo giáo án thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "plan_code": "KIDS_STARTER_V1",
        "plan_name": "Kids Starter",
        "version": 1,
        "status": "draft",
        "total_lessons": 0
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

POST v1/edu/lesson-plan/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

plan_code   string     

Unique lesson-plan code. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: KIDS_STARTER_V1

plan_name   string     

Lesson-plan name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Kids Starter

course_id   integer     

Owning course id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

level_id   integer  optional    

Level id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

description   string  optional    

Description. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

Update lesson plan

requires authentication

Blocked once published or used by a class (must clone instead).

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"plan_code\": \"KIDS_STARTER_V1\",
    \"plan_name\": \"Kids Starter\",
    \"level_id\": 1,
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "plan_code": "KIDS_STARTER_V1",
    "plan_name": "Kids Starter",
    "level_id": 1,
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật giáo án thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "plan_name": "Kids Starter Updated",
        "status": "draft"
    },

Clone lesson plan

requires authentication

Creates a new draft plan (next version) copying lessons and materials.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/clone/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"plan_code\": \"KIDS_STARTER_V2\",
    \"plan_name\": \"Kids Starter\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/clone/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "plan_code": "KIDS_STARTER_V2",
    "plan_name": "Kids Starter"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Sao chép giáo án thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 2,
        "plan_code": "KIDS_STARTER_V2",
        "version": 2,
        "status": "draft"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

POST v1/edu/lesson-plan/clone/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The source lesson plan ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

plan_code   string     

Code for the cloned plan. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: KIDS_STARTER_V2

plan_name   string  optional    

Name for the cloned plan (defaults to source). Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Kids Starter

Publish lesson plan

requires authentication

Requires at least one valid lesson; records a version entry.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/publish/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"change_summary\": \"Cập nhật từ vựng buổi 5\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/publish/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "change_summary": "Cập nhật từ vựng buổi 5"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Xuất bản giáo án thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "published",
        "published_at": "2026-06-16T00:00:00.000000Z"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Education - Lesson Plan Lessons

Manage lesson templates and materials inside a lesson plan.

Add a lesson to a plan

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/create/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"lesson_no\": 1,
    \"lesson_title\": \"My Family\",
    \"objective\": \"Giới thiệu thành viên gia đình\",
    \"vocabulary\": \"Father, Mother, Brother, Sister\",
    \"grammar\": \"This is my...\",
    \"activities\": \"Flashcard, Speaking\",
    \"homework\": \"Workbook page 10\",
    \"duration\": 60
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/create/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "lesson_no": 1,
    "lesson_title": "My Family",
    "objective": "Giới thiệu thành viên gia đình",
    "vocabulary": "Father, Mother, Brother, Sister",
    "grammar": "This is my...",
    "activities": "Flashcard, Speaking",
    "homework": "Workbook page 10",
    "duration": 60
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thêm buổi học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "lesson_plan_id": 1,
        "lesson_no": 1,
        "lesson_title": "Alphabet"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/create/{planId}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

planId   integer     

The lesson plan ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

lesson_no   integer  optional    

Lesson order (must be the next number to stay contiguous; omit to auto-assign). Must be at least 1. Example: 1

lesson_title   string     

Lesson title. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: My Family

objective   string  optional    

Learning objective. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Giới thiệu thành viên gia đình

vocabulary   string  optional    

Vocabulary. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Father, Mother, Brother, Sister

grammar   string  optional    

Grammar point. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: This is my...

activities   string  optional    

Activities. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Flashcard, Speaking

homework   string  optional    

Homework. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Workbook page 10

duration   integer  optional    

Duration in minutes. Must be at least 1. Example: 60

Update a lesson

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"lesson_title\": \"My Family\",
    \"objective\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"vocabulary\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"grammar\": \"qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo\",
    \"activities\": \"auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr\",
    \"homework\": \"byickznkygloigmkwxphl\",
    \"duration\": 60
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "lesson_title": "My Family",
    "objective": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "vocabulary": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "grammar": "qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo",
    "activities": "auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr",
    "homework": "byickznkygloigmkwxphl",
    "duration": 60
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật buổi học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "lesson_no": 1,
        "lesson_title": "Alphabet & Numbers"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The lesson ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

lesson_title   string  optional    

Lesson title. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: My Family

objective   string  optional    

Learning objective. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

vocabulary   string  optional    

Vocabulary. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

grammar   string  optional    

Grammar point. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo

activities   string  optional    

Activities. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr

homework   string  optional    

Homework. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: byickznkygloigmkwxphl

duration   integer  optional    

Duration in minutes. Must be at least 1. Example: 60

Delete a lesson

requires authentication

Remaining lessons are re-sequenced to stay contiguous.

Example request:
curl --request DELETE \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/delete/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/delete/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Xóa buổi học thành công.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Reorder lessons

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/reorder/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"lesson_ids\": [
        17
    ]
}"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/reorder/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "lesson_ids": [
        17
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

    "errors": null
}

Education - Lesson Plan Materials

Attach and detach learning materials on a lesson template (lesson-plan.md §14).

Attach a material to a lesson

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/1/material/attach" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"file_id\": 10,
    \"material_type\": \"pdf\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/1/material/attach"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "file_id": 10,
    "material_type": "pdf"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Gắn tài liệu thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "lesson_plan_lesson_id": 1,
        "file_id": 10,
        "material_type": "pdf"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/lesson-plan/lesson/{id}/material/attach

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The lesson ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

file_id   integer     

Reference to the uploaded file. Must be at least 1. Example: 10

material_type   string     

Material type: pdf, video, audio, slide, worksheet, homework. Example: pdf

Must be one of:
  • pdf
  • video
  • audio
  • slide
  • worksheet
  • homework

Education - Lesson Plan Versions

Browse the published-version history of a lesson plan (lesson-plan.md §13).

List versions of a plan

requires authentication

Returns the plan's version history, newest first.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/version/list/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/lesson-plan/version/list/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thành công.",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 2,
            "lesson_plan_id": 1,
            "version": 2,
            "change_summary": "Bổ sung buổi học",
            "published_at": "2026-06-17T00:00:00.000000Z",
            "published_by": 5
        },
        {
            "id": 1,
            "lesson_plan_id": 1,
            "version": 1,
            "change_summary": null,
            "published_at": "2026-06-10T00:00:00.000000Z",
            "published_by": 5
        }
    ],
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Education - Level

Level master: the learning-path catalogue of proficiency levels per course (student-level.md §V).

List levels

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/level/list?search=Starter&course_id=1&cefr_level=A1&status=active" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/level/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "Starter",
    "course_id": "1",
    "cefr_level": "A1",
    "status": "active",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "code": 401,
    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],
    "data": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/edu/level/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Match level code or name. Example: Starter

course_id   integer  optional    

Filter by course. Example: 1

cefr_level   string  optional    

Filter by CEFR mapping. Example: A1

status   string  optional    

Filter: active or inactive. Example: active

Headers

Example: application/json

Create level

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/level/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"level_code\": \"KIDS-STARTER\",
    \"level_name\": \"Starter\",
    \"course_id\": 1,
    \"level_order\": 1,
    \"cefr_level\": \"Pre-A1\",
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"status\": \"active\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/level/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "level_code": "KIDS-STARTER",
    "level_name": "Starter",
    "course_id": 1,
    "level_order": 1,
    "cefr_level": "Pre-A1",
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "status": "active"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "code": 401,
    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],
    "data": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/level/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

level_code   string     

Unique level code. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: KIDS-STARTER

level_name   string     

Level name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Starter

course_id   integer     

Owning course id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

level_order   integer     

Position in the learning path (1-based). Must be at least 1. Example: 1

cefr_level   string  optional    

CEFR mapping. Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: Pre-A1

description   string  optional    

Description. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

status   string  optional    

Status: active or inactive (default active). Example: active

Must be one of:
  • active
  • inactive

Update level

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/level/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"level_code\": \"KIDS-STARTER\",
    \"level_name\": \"Starter\",
    \"course_id\": 1,
    \"level_order\": 1,
    \"cefr_level\": \"Pre-A1\",
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"status\": \"active\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/level/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "level_code": "KIDS-STARTER",
    "level_name": "Starter",
    "course_id": 1,
    "level_order": 1,
    "cefr_level": "Pre-A1",
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "status": "active"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Education - Material

Central learning-resource library: documents, versioning and links to courses, lesson plans, lessons and assignments (material.md).

requires authentication

    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material/list" \

GET v1/edu/material/detail/{id}

Headers

Authorization

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The material ID. Example: 1

Create material

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"material_name\": \"Workbook Starter\",
    \"material_type\": \"pdf\",
    \"category_id\": 1,
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"access_type\": \"student\",
    \"file_id\": 10,
    \"file_name\": \"workbook-starter.pdf\",
    \"file_size\": 1048576,
    \"mime_type\": \"application\\/pdf\",
    \"change_log\": \"Bản phát hành đầu tiên\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "material_name": "Workbook Starter",
    "material_type": "pdf",
    "category_id": 1,
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "access_type": "student",
    "file_id": 10,
    "file_name": "workbook-starter.pdf",
    "file_size": 1048576,
    "mime_type": "application\/pdf",
    "change_log": "Bản phát hành đầu tiên"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{

    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],
    "data": null
}

Request      

POST v1/edu/material/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

material_name   string     

Material name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Workbook Starter

material_type   string     

Type: pdf, document, image, video, audio, presentation, worksheet, homework, exam, other. Example: pdf

Must be one of:
  • pdf
  • document
  • image
  • video
  • audio
  • presentation
  • worksheet
  • homework
  • exam
  • other
category_id   integer  optional    

Category id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

description   string  optional    

Description. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

access_type   string     

Access audience: teacher, student, parent, internal. Example: student

Must be one of:
  • teacher
  • student
  • parent
  • internal
file_id   integer  optional    

Reference to the uploaded file (optional first version). Must be at least 1. Example: 10

file_name   string  optional    

Original file name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: workbook-starter.pdf

file_size   integer  optional    

File size in bytes. Must be at least 0. Example: 1048576

mime_type   string  optional    

File mime type. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: application/pdf

change_log   string  optional    

Change note for this version. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Bản phát hành đầu tiên

Update material

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"material_name\": \"Workbook Starter\",
    \"material_type\": \"pdf\",
    \"category_id\": 1,
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"access_type\": \"student\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "material_name": "Workbook Starter",
    "material_type": "pdf",
    "category_id": 1,
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "access_type": "student"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "code": 401,
    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],
    "data": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT v1/edu/material/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The material ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

material_name   string  optional    

Material name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Workbook Starter

material_type   string  optional    

Material type. Example: pdf

Must be one of:
  • pdf
  • document
  • image
  • video
  • audio
  • presentation
  • worksheet
  • homework
  • exam
  • other
category_id   integer  optional    

Category id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

description   string  optional    

Description. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

access_type   string  optional    

Access audience: teacher, student, parent, internal. Example: student

Must be one of:
  • teacher
  • student
  • parent
  • internal

Upload a new version

requires authentication

Real file storage is not implemented; the file is referenced by id + metadata.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material/upload/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"file_id\": 11,
    \"file_name\": \"workbook-starter-v2.pdf\",
    \"file_size\": 2097152,
    \"mime_type\": \"application\\/pdf\",
    \"change_log\": \"Bổ sung chương 5\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material/upload/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "file_id": 11,
    "file_name": "workbook-starter-v2.pdf",
    "file_size": 2097152,
    "mime_type": "application\/pdf",
    "change_log": "Bổ sung chương 5"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *

}

Request      

POST v1/edu/material/upload/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The material ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

file_id   integer  optional    

Reference to the uploaded file. Must be at least 1. Example: 11

file_name   string     

Original file name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: workbook-starter-v2.pdf

file_size   integer  optional    

File size in bytes. Must be at least 0. Example: 2097152

mime_type   string  optional    

File mime type. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: application/pdf

change_log   string  optional    

What changed in this version. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Bổ sung chương 5

Roll back to a previous version

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material/rollback/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"version\": 1
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material/rollback/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "version": 1
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET v1/edu/material-category/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Create category

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material-category/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"category_name\": \"Workbook\",
    \"category_code\": \"WORKBOOK\",
    \"sort_order\": 1,
    \"status\": \"active\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material-category/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "category_name": "Workbook",
    "category_code": "WORKBOOK",
    "sort_order": 1,
    "status": "active"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST v1/edu/material-category/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

category_name   string     

Category name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Workbook

category_code   string     

Unique category code. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: WORKBOOK

sort_order   integer  optional    

Display order. Must be at least 0. Example: 1

status   string  optional    

active | inactive. Example: active

Must be one of:
  • active
  • inactive

requires authentication

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/material-category/update/1" \

    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"category_name\": \"Workbook\",
    \"sort_order\": 1,
    \"status\": \"active\"
}"

);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "sort_order": 1,

Education - Question

Question bank: author, review, version and reuse questions, and auto-generate exams from them (question.md).

Create question

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/question/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"question_type\": \"single_choice\",
    \"skill\": \"grammar\",
    \"difficulty\": \"easy\",
    \"level_id\": 1,
    \"category_id\": 1,
    \"score\": 2,
    \"content\": \"What color is the sky?\",
    \"explanation\": \"The sky appears blue.\",
    \"cefr_level\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"cambridge_level\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"learning_objective\": \"qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo\",
    \"grammar_topic\": \"auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr\",
    \"vocabulary_topic\": \"byickznkygloigmkwxphl\",
    \"answers\": [
        {
            \"answer_key\": \"A\",
            \"answer_content\": \"Red\",
            \"is_correct\": false
        },
        {
            \"answer_key\": \"B\",
            \"answer_content\": \"Blue\",
            \"is_correct\": true
        }
    ],
    \"tag_ids\": [
        17
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/question/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "question_type": "single_choice",
    "skill": "grammar",
    "difficulty": "easy",
    "level_id": 1,
    "category_id": 1,
    "score": 2,
    "content": "What color is the sky?",
    "explanation": "The sky appears blue.",
    "cefr_level": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "cambridge_level": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "learning_objective": "qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo",
    "grammar_topic": "auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr",
    "vocabulary_topic": "byickznkygloigmkwxphl",
    "answers": [
        {
            "answer_key": "A",
            "answer_content": "Red",
            "is_correct": false
        },
        {
            "answer_key": "B",
            "answer_content": "Blue",
            "is_correct": true
        }
    ],
    "tag_ids": [
        17
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers

content-type: application/json

}

Request      

POST v1/edu/question/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

question_type   string     

Type: single_choice, multiple_choice, true_false, matching, ordering, fill_blank, short_answer, essay, speaking, listening. Example: single_choice

Must be one of:
  • single_choice
  • multiple_choice
  • true_false
  • matching
  • ordering
  • fill_blank
  • short_answer
  • essay
  • speaking
  • listening
skill   string     

Skill: listening, speaking, reading, writing, grammar, vocabulary. Example: grammar

Must be one of:
  • listening
  • speaking
  • reading
  • writing
  • grammar
  • vocabulary
difficulty   string     

Difficulty: easy, medium, hard. Example: easy

Must be one of:
  • easy
  • medium
  • hard
level_id   integer  optional    

Owning level (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

category_id   integer  optional    

Owning category (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

score   number     

Score (> 0). Example: 2

content   string     

Question content. Example: What color is the sky?

explanation   string  optional    

Explanation (optional). Example: The sky appears blue.

cefr_level   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

cambridge_level   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

learning_objective   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo

grammar_topic   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr

vocabulary_topic   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: byickznkygloigmkwxphl

answers   object[]  optional    

Answer options.
answer_key   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

answer_content   string  optional    

This field is required when answers is present. Example: consequatur

is_correct   boolean  optional    

Example: false

sort_order   integer  optional    

Example: 17

tag_ids   integer[]  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

Update question

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/question/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"question_type\": \"single_choice\",
    \"skill\": \"grammar\",
    \"difficulty\": \"easy\",
    \"level_id\": 17,
    \"category_id\": 17,
    \"score\": 2,
    \"content\": \"What color is the sky?\",
    \"explanation\": \"consequatur\",
    \"change_log\": \"Fixed a typo.\",
    \"cefr_level\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
    \"cambridge_level\": \"mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq\",
    \"learning_objective\": \"xbajwbpilpmufinllwloa\",
    \"grammar_topic\": \"uydlsmsjuryvojcybzvrb\",
    \"vocabulary_topic\": \"yickznkygloigmkwxphlv\",
    \"answers\": [
        {
            \"answer_key\": \"A\",
            \"answer_content\": \"Red\",
            \"is_correct\": true
        }
    ],
    \"tag_ids\": [
        17
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/question/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "question_type": "single_choice",
    "skill": "grammar",
    "difficulty": "easy",
    "level_id": 17,
    "category_id": 17,
    "score": 2,
    "content": "What color is the sky?",
    "explanation": "consequatur",
    "change_log": "Fixed a typo.",
    "cefr_level": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
    "cambridge_level": "mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq",
    "learning_objective": "xbajwbpilpmufinllwloa",
    "grammar_topic": "uydlsmsjuryvojcybzvrb",
    "vocabulary_topic": "yickznkygloigmkwxphlv",
    "answers": [
        {
            "answer_key": "A",
            "answer_content": "Red",
            "is_correct": true
        }
    ],
    "tag_ids": [
        17
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *

    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",

Request      

PUT v1/edu/question/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The question ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

question_type   string  optional    

Type: single_choice, multiple_choice, true_false, matching, ordering, fill_blank, short_answer, essay, speaking, listening. Example: single_choice

Must be one of:
  • single_choice
  • multiple_choice
  • true_false
  • matching
  • ordering
  • fill_blank
  • short_answer
  • essay
  • speaking
  • listening
skill   string  optional    

Skill: listening, speaking, reading, writing, grammar, vocabulary. Example: grammar

Must be one of:
  • listening
  • speaking
  • reading
  • writing
  • grammar
  • vocabulary
difficulty   string  optional    

Difficulty: easy, medium, hard. Example: easy

Must be one of:
  • easy
  • medium
  • hard
level_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

category_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

score   number  optional    

Score (> 0). Example: 2

content   string  optional    

Question content. Example: What color is the sky?

explanation   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

change_log   string  optional    

Change note recorded when versioning a used question. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: Fixed a typo.

cefr_level   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

cambridge_level   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq

learning_objective   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: xbajwbpilpmufinllwloa

grammar_topic   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: uydlsmsjuryvojcybzvrb

vocabulary_topic   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: yickznkygloigmkwxphlv

answers   object[]  optional    

Replacement answer options.
answer_key   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

answer_content   string  optional    

This field is required when answers is present. Example: consequatur

is_correct   boolean  optional    

Example: true

sort_order   integer  optional    

Example: 17

tag_ids   integer[]  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

Activate question

requires authentication

Only ACTIVE questions can be drawn into exams (BR005).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/question/activate/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "Content-Type": "application/json",

};


fetch(url, {

Import questions

requires authentication

Parses an uploaded spreadsheet (referenced by file_id), persisting valid rows and reporting per-row errors without rolling back the batch (BR008).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/question/import" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"file_id\": 10,
    \"file_name\": \"questions.xlsx\",
    \"level_id\": 1,
    \"category_id\": 1,
    \"default_score\": 1,
    \"default_skill\": \"grammar\",
    \"default_difficulty\": \"easy\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/question/import"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "file_id": 10,
    "file_name": "questions.xlsx",
    "level_id": 1,
    "category_id": 1,
    "default_score": 1,
    "default_skill": "grammar",
    "default_difficulty": "easy"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "code": 401,
    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],
    "data": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/question/import

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

file_id   integer     

Uploaded media id of the spreadsheet (Question | Option A-D | Correct Answer | Difficulty | Skill). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 10

file_name   string  optional    

Original file name (optional, for display). Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: questions.xlsx

level_id   integer  optional    

Level applied to all imported questions (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

category_id   integer  optional    

Category applied to all imported questions (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

default_score   number  optional    

Score for rows that omit one (default 1). Example: 1

default_skill   string  optional    

Skill fallback when a row omits it. Example: grammar

Must be one of:
  • listening
  • speaking
  • reading
  • writing
  • grammar
  • vocabulary
default_difficulty   string  optional    

Difficulty fallback when a row omits it. Example: easy

Must be one of:
  • easy
  • medium
  • hard

Generate an exam

requires authentication

Draws ACTIVE bank questions by skill/level/difficulty into a new draft exam (BR005, BR009, BR010).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/question/generate-exam" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"exam_name\": \"Grammar Quiz - Starter\",
    \"exam_type\": \"progress\",
    \"course_id\": 1,
    \"level_id\": 1,
    \"duration\": 30,
    \"passing_score\": 15,
    \"skill\": \"grammar\",
    \"difficulties\": [
        {
            \"difficulty\": \"easy\",
            \"count\": 10
        },
        {
            \"difficulty\": \"medium\",
            \"count\": 5
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/question/generate-exam"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "exam_name": "Grammar Quiz - Starter",
    "exam_type": "progress",
    "course_id": 1,
    "level_id": 1,
    "duration": 30,
    "passing_score": 15,
    "skill": "grammar",
    "difficulties": [
        {
            "difficulty": "easy",
            "count": 10
        },
        {
            "difficulty": "medium",
            "count": 5
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "code": 401,
    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],
    "data": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/question/generate-exam

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

exam_name   string     

Generated exam name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Grammar Quiz - Starter

exam_type   string     

Type: placement, progress, midterm, final, promotion, mock_test, certification. Example: progress

Must be one of:
  • placement
  • progress
  • midterm
  • final
  • promotion
  • mock_test
  • certification
course_id   integer  optional    

Owning course (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

level_id   integer  optional    

Restrict to a level (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

duration   integer     

Duration in minutes (> 0). Example: 30

passing_score   number     

Minimum score to pass. Example: 15

skill   string     

Skill to draw questions for. Example: grammar

Must be one of:
  • listening
  • speaking
  • reading
  • writing
  • grammar
  • vocabulary
difficulties   object[]     

Per-difficulty counts to draw. Must have at least 1 items.
difficulty   string     

Example: easy

Must be one of:
  • easy
  • medium
  • hard
count   integer     

Example: 17

Education - Question Versions

Browse a question's version history (question.md §IV "Version câu hỏi"). Snapshots are recorded automatically when an in-use question is edited (BR007).

List versions of a question

requires authentication

Returns the question's version history, newest first.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/question/version/list/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \

Education - Room

Manage classrooms (physical rooms) used for scheduling classes and sessions.

List rooms

requires authentication

Paginated, filterable list of rooms.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/room/list?search=A101&branch_id=1&room_code=A1&room_name=Ph%C3%B2ng&room_type=classroom&status=active&floor=1&sort_by=room_code&sort_dir=asc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/room/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "A101",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "room_code": "A1",
    "room_name": "Phòng",
    "room_type": "classroom",
    "status": "active",
    "floor": "1",
    "sort_by": "room_code",
    "sort_dir": "asc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "room_code": "A101",
                "room_name": "Phòng A101",
                "floor": "1",
                "capacity": 25,
                "room_type": "classroom",
                "status": "active",
                "branch_id": 1,
                "active_classes_count": 2
            }
        ],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 1,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/edu/room/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by room code or name. Example: A101

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by branch. Example: 1

room_code   string  optional    

Filter by room code (partial). Example: A1

room_name   string  optional    

Filter by room name (partial). Example: Phòng

room_type   string  optional    

Filter by room type. Example: classroom

status   string  optional    

Filter by status: active, inactive, maintenance. Example: active

floor   string  optional    

Filter by floor. Example: 1

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: room_code, room_name, capacity, floor, status, created_at. Example: room_code

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc (default desc). Example: asc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

Room detail

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/room/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/room/detail/1"
);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

}).then(response => response.json());

                "name": "Kids Basic 01",

                "max_capacity": 20
            }

GET v1/edu/room/detail/{id}

Headers

Authorization

Create room

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/room/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"room_code\": \"A101\",
    \"room_name\": \"Phòng A101\",
    \"floor\": \"1\",
    \"capacity\": 25,
    \"room_type\": \"classroom\",
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/room/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "branch_id": 1,
    "room_code": "A101",
    "room_name": "Phòng A101",
    "floor": "1",
    "capacity": 25,
    "room_type": "classroom",
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo phòng học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "room_code": "A101",
        "room_name": "Phòng A101",
        "capacity": 25,
        "room_type": "classroom",
        "status": "active",
        "branch_id": 1
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/room/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

branch_id   integer     

Owning branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

room_code   string     

Room code, unique within the branch. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: A101

room_name   string     

Room name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Phòng A101

floor   string  optional    

Floor. Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: 1

capacity   integer     

Maximum capacity (> 0). Must be at least 1. Example: 25

room_type   string     

Room type: classroom, computer_room, speaking_room, exam_room, meeting_room, other. Example: classroom

Must be one of:
  • classroom
  • computer_room
  • speaking_room
  • exam_room
  • meeting_room
  • other
description   string  optional    

Notes. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

Suspend room

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/room/suspend/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Phòng đang sửa chữa\",
    \"force\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/room/suspend/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Phòng đang sửa chữa",
    "force": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Ngừng sử dụng phòng học thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "room_code": "A101",
        "status": "inactive"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/room/suspend/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The room ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

reason   string     

Reason for suspending the room. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: Phòng đang sửa chữa

force   boolean  optional    

Confirm suspension even when future sessions are scheduled (room.md BR005). Example: false

Check room schedule conflict

requires authentication

Detects sessions in the room that overlap the given slot (room.md §11, BR006).

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/room/schedule/1?lesson_date=2026-07-01&start_time=08%3A00&end_time=10%3A00&ignore_session_id=5" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/room/schedule/1"
);

const params = {
    "lesson_date": "2026-07-01",
    "start_time": "08:00",
    "end_time": "10:00",
    "ignore_session_id": "5",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "has_conflict": true,
        "conflicts": [
            {
                "id": 9,
                "class_id": 3,
                "session_date": "2026-07-01",
                "start_time": "08:00:00",
                "end_time": "10:00:00"
            }
        ]
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/edu/room/schedule/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The room ID. Example: 1

Query Parameters

lesson_date   string     

Date to check (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-07-01

start_time   string     

Start time (H:i). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 08:00

end_time   string     

End time (H:i). Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Must be a date after start_time. Example: 10:00

ignore_session_id   integer  optional    

Session id to exclude (e.g. when rescheduling itself). Example: 5

Education - Student

Manage students (enrollment lifecycle).

List students

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student/list?search=alice&business_id=1&branch_id=1&level=A1&status=active&enrolled_from=2026-01-01&enrolled_to=2026-12-31&sort_by=created_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "alice",
    "business_id": "1",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "level": "A1",
    "status": "active",
    "enrolled_from": "2026-01-01",
    "enrolled_to": "2026-12-31",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "code": "STU001",
                "name": "Nguyễn Văn A",
                "level_id": 1,
                "status": "active",
                "email": "a@example.com",
                "phone": "0900000000",
                "business_id": 1,
                "branch_id": 1
            }
        ],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 1,
            "per_page": 15,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

GET v1/edu/student/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by code, name, email, phone or parent name. Example: alice

business_id   integer  optional    

Filter by business id. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by branch id. Example: 1

level   string  optional    

Filter by level. Example: A1

status   string  optional    

Filter by status. Example: active

enrolled_from   string  optional    

date Enrolled on or after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-01-01

enrolled_to   string  optional    

date Enrolled on or before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: code, name, enrollment_date, created_at. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1
