Create student

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"Nguyen Van A\",
    \"dob\": \"2010-05-12\",
    \"gender\": \"male\",
    \"avatar\": \"https:\\/\\/cdn.hana.edu.vn\\/a.png\",
    \"nationality\": \"Vietnam\",
    \"language\": \"Vietnamese\",
    \"email\": \"a@gmail.com\",
    \"phone\": \"0901234567\",
    \"business_id\": 1,
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"level_id\": 1,
    \"enrollment_date\": \"2026-06-01\",
    \"admission_source\": \"Facebook\",
    \"address\": \"123 Le Loi\",
    \"province\": \"Ho Chi Minh\",
    \"district\": \"District 7\",
    \"school\": \"THPT Le Quy Don\",
    \"grade\": \"9\",
    \"note\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"parents\": [
        {
            \"parent_id\": 17,
            \"name\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
            \"phone\": \"mniihfqcoynlazghd\",
            \"email\": \"tnitzsche@example.org\",
            \"relation\": \"xbajwbpilpmufinllwloa\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "Nguyen Van A",
    "dob": "2010-05-12",
    "gender": "male",
    "avatar": "https:\/\/cdn.hana.edu.vn\/a.png",
    "nationality": "Vietnam",
    "language": "Vietnamese",
    "email": "a@gmail.com",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "business_id": 1,
    "branch_id": 1,
    "level_id": 1,
    "enrollment_date": "2026-06-01",
    "admission_source": "Facebook",
    "address": "123 Le Loi",
    "province": "Ho Chi Minh",
    "district": "District 7",
    "school": "THPT Le Quy Don",
    "grade": "9",
    "note": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "parents": [
        {
            "parent_id": 17,
            "name": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
            "phone": "mniihfqcoynlazghd",
            "email": "tnitzsche@example.org",
            "relation": "xbajwbpilpmufinllwloa"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo học viên thành công.",
    "data": {

        "code": "STU001",
        "name": "Nguyễn Văn A",

Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/edu/student/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Full name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Nguyen Van A

dob   string     

Date of birth (<= today). Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 2010-05-12

gender   string     

male|female|other. Example: male

Must be one of:
  • male
  • female
  • other
avatar   string  optional    

Avatar URL. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: https://cdn.hana.edu.vn/a.png

nationality   string  optional    

Nationality. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Vietnam

language   string  optional    

Native language. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Vietnamese

email   string  optional    

Contact email. Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: a@gmail.com

phone   string  optional    

Contact phone. Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0901234567

business_id   integer     

Business id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

branch_id   integer     

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

level_id   integer  optional    

Proficiency level id (edu_levels). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

enrollment_date   string     

Enrollment date. Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-01

admission_source   string  optional    

Admission source. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Facebook

address   string  optional    

Address. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: 123 Le Loi

province   string  optional    

Province / city. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Ho Chi Minh

district   string  optional    

District. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: District 7

school   string  optional    

School. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: THPT Le Quy Don

grade   string  optional    

Grade. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: 9

note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

parents   object[]  optional    

Parents/guardians to assign.
parent_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

name   string  optional    

This field is required when parents.*.parent_id is not present. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: mniihfqcoynlazghd

email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: tnitzsche@example.org

relation   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: xbajwbpilpmufinllwloa

Update student

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"Nguyen Van A\",
    \"dob\": \"2010-05-12\",
    \"gender\": \"male\",
    \"avatar\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"nationality\": \"Vietnam\",
    \"language\": \"Vietnamese\",
    \"email\": \"a@gmail.com\",
    \"phone\": \"0901234567\",
    \"level_id\": 1,
    \"admission_source\": \"Referral\",
    \"address\": \"123 Le Loi\",
    \"province\": \"Ho Chi Minh\",
    \"district\": \"District 7\",
    \"school\": \"THPT Le Quy Don\",
    \"grade\": \"9\",
    \"note\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"parents\": [
        {
            \"parent_id\": 17,
            \"name\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
            \"phone\": \"mniihfqcoynlazghd\",
            \"email\": \"tnitzsche@example.org\",
            \"relation\": \"xbajwbpilpmufinllwloa\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "Nguyen Van A",
    "dob": "2010-05-12",
    "gender": "male",
    "avatar": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "nationality": "Vietnam",
    "language": "Vietnamese",
    "email": "a@gmail.com",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "level_id": 1,
    "admission_source": "Referral",
    "address": "123 Le Loi",
    "province": "Ho Chi Minh",
    "district": "District 7",
    "school": "THPT Le Quy Don",
    "grade": "9",
    "note": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "parents": [
        {
            "parent_id": 17,
            "name": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
            "phone": "mniihfqcoynlazghd",
            "email": "tnitzsche@example.org",
            "relation": "xbajwbpilpmufinllwloa"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật học viên thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "STU001",
        "name": "Nguyễn Văn A",
        "level_id": 1,
        "status": "active"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT v1/edu/student/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The student ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Full name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Nguyen Van A

dob   string  optional    

Date of birth (<= today). Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 2010-05-12

gender   string  optional    

male|female|other. Example: male

Must be one of:
  • male
  • female
  • other
avatar   string  optional    

Avatar URL. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

nationality   string  optional    

Nationality. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Vietnam

language   string  optional    

Native language. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Vietnamese

email   string  optional    

Contact email. Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: a@gmail.com

phone   string  optional    

Contact phone. Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0901234567

level_id   integer  optional    

Proficiency level id (edu_levels). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

admission_source   string  optional    

Admission source. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Referral

address   string  optional    

Address. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: 123 Le Loi

province   string  optional    

Province / city. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Ho Chi Minh

district   string  optional    

District. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: District 7

school   string  optional    

School. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: THPT Le Quy Don

grade   string  optional    

Grade. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: 9

note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

parents   object[]  optional    

Parents/guardians (replaces existing assignments).
parent_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

name   string  optional    

This field is required when parents.*.parent_id is not present. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: mniihfqcoynlazghd

email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: tnitzsche@example.org

relation   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: xbajwbpilpmufinllwloa

Suspend student

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student/suspend/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"stop_date\": \"2026-06-12\",
    \"reason\": \"Nghỉ dài hạn\",
    \"note\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student/suspend/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "stop_date": "2026-06-12",
    "reason": "Nghỉ dài hạn",
    "note": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Authorization

note   string  optional    

Additional note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

Education - Student Level

A student's current proficiency level: placement, promotion, manual adjustment and change history (student-level.md).

Placement

requires authentication

Records a placement assessment and assigns the resulting level (BR001/BR002).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student-level/placement" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"student_id\": 1,
    \"course_id\": 1,
    \"level_id\": 1,
    \"assessment_type\": \"placement_test\",
    \"score\": 45,
    \"comment\": \"Good speaking, weak grammar.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student-level/placement"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "student_id": 1,
    "course_id": 1,
    "level_id": 1,
    "assessment_type": "placement_test",
    "score": 45,
    "comment": "Good speaking, weak grammar."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *

}

Request      

POST v1/edu/student-level/placement

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

student_id   integer     

Student id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

course_id   integer     

Course the level belongs to. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

level_id   integer     

Assigned level id (must belong to the course). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

assessment_type   string  optional    

Assessment source: placement_test or teacher_evaluation. Example: placement_test

Must be one of:
  • placement_test
  • teacher_evaluation
score   number  optional    

Placement score (0–100). Must be between 0 and 100. Example: 45

comment   string  optional    

Assessor note. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Good speaking, weak grammar.

Promote

requires authentication

Promotes the student to the next level (or an explicit target).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student-level/promote/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"target_level_id\": 2,
    \"reason\": \"Đạt yêu cầu lên cấp.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student-level/promote/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "target_level_id": 2,
    "reason": "Đạt yêu cầu lên cấp."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *

    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],

}

Request      

POST v1/edu/student-level/promote/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The student-level ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

target_level_id   integer  optional    

Explicit target level; defaults to the next level in the path. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 2

reason   string  optional    

Promotion note. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Đạt yêu cầu lên cấp.

Adjust

requires authentication

Manually moves the student to another level in the same course (BR002).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student-level/adjust/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"target_level_id\": 1,
    \"reason\": \"Đánh giá đầu vào chưa chính xác.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/edu/student-level/adjust/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "target_level_id": 1,
    "reason": "Đánh giá đầu vào chưa chính xác."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST v1/edu/student-level/adjust/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The student-level ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

target_level_id   integer     

Target level id (must belong to the same course). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

reason   string     

Reason for the manual adjustment. Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: Đánh giá đầu vào chưa chính xác.

Finance - Account

Manage funds (quỹ) — cash, bank, e-wallet — whose balances move with confirmed payments (payment.md §VI).

List accounts

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/account/list?search=ACC&business_id=1&branch_id=1&type=cash&status=active&per_page=20" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/account/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "ACC",
    "business_id": "1",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "type": "cash",
    "status": "active",
    "per_page": "20",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 0,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/fin/account/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by code, name or account number. Example: ACC

business_id   integer  optional    

Filter by business id. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by branch id. Example: 1

type   string  optional    

Filter: cash|bank|ewallet. Example: cash

status   string  optional    

Filter: active|inactive. Example: active

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100. Example: 20

Account detail

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \

Create account

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/account/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"business_id\": 1,
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"name\": \"Tiền mặt trung tâm\",
    \"type\": \"cash\",
    \"currency\": \"VND\",
    \"balance\": 0,
    \"bank_name\": \"Vietcombank\",
    \"account_number\": \"0123456789\",
    \"note\": \"Quỹ tiền mặt CN Q12\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/account/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "business_id": 1,
    "branch_id": 1,
    "name": "Tiền mặt trung tâm",
    "type": "cash",
    "currency": "VND",
    "balance": 0,
    "bank_name": "Vietcombank",
    "account_number": "0123456789",
    "note": "Quỹ tiền mặt CN Q12"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo quỹ thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "ACC2026/000001",
        "type": "cash",
        "balance": "0.00"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:

Request      

POST v1/fin/account/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

business_id   integer     

Business (trung tâm) id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

name   string     

Fund name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Tiền mặt trung tâm

type   string     

cash|bank|ewallet. Example: cash

Must be one of:
  • cash
  • bank
  • ewallet
currency   string  optional    

Currency code (default VND). Must not be greater than 10 characters. Example: VND

balance   number  optional    

Opening balance. Must be at least 0. Example: 0

bank_name   string  optional    

Bank name (for bank accounts). Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Vietcombank

account_number   string  optional    

Bank/e-wallet account number. Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: 0123456789

note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Quỹ tiền mặt CN Q12

Update account

requires authentication

Code, business and balance are immutable.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/account/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"name\": \"Tiền mặt trung tâm\",
    \"currency\": \"VND\",
    \"bank_name\": \"Vietcombank\",
    \"account_number\": \"0123456789\",
    \"status\": \"active\",
    \"note\": \"Cập nhật ghi chú\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/account/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "branch_id": 1,
    "name": "Tiền mặt trung tâm",
    "currency": "VND",
    "bank_name": "Vietcombank",
    "account_number": "0123456789",
    "status": "active",
    "note": "Cập nhật ghi chú"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật quỹ thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Fund name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Tiền mặt trung tâm

currency   string  optional

Bank name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Vietcombank

account_number   string  optional    

Account number. Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: 0123456789

status   string  optional    

active|inactive. Example: active

Must be one of:
  • active
  • inactive
note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Cập nhật ghi chú

Finance - Debt

Receivable/payable debt computed live from invoices and payments, with aging, dashboard, adjustments, write-off approval, collection and reconciliation (debt.md).

List debts

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/list?search=INV&invoice_type=receivable&partner_type=student&status=overdue&business_id=1&branch_id=1&min_amount=1000000&max_amount=5000000&overdue=1&per_page=20" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "INV",
    "invoice_type": "receivable",
    "partner_type": "student",
    "status": "overdue",
    "business_id": "1",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "min_amount": "1000000",
    "max_amount": "5000000",
    "overdue": "1",
    "per_page": "20",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 0,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/fin/debt/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by invoice code. Example: INV

invoice_type   string  optional    

Filter: receivable|payable. Example: receivable

partner_type   string  optional    

Filter by partner type. Example: student

status   string  optional    

Filter: current|overdue|written_off|closed. Example: overdue

business_id   integer  optional    

Filter by business id. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by branch id. Example: 1

min_amount   number  optional    

Minimum outstanding. Example: 1000000

max_amount   number  optional    

Maximum outstanding. Example: 5000000

overdue   boolean  optional    

Only overdue debts. Example: true

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100. Example: 20

Aging report

requires authentication

Outstanding grouped into current / 1-30 / 31-60 / 61-90 / >90 day buckets.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/aging?invoice_type=receivable&business_id=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/aging"
);

const params = {
    "invoice_type": "receivable",
    "business_id": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "current": 0,
        "overdue_1_30": 0,
        "overdue_31_60": 0,
        "overdue_61_90": 0,
        "overdue_90_plus": 0,
        "total": 0
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

Debt detail

requires authentication

Returns the invoice with its payment history and debt adjustments (debt.md §VI).

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/detail/1"
);

    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "debt": {
            "invoice_id": 1,
            "outstanding": "1000000.00"
        },
        "payments": [],
        "adjustments": []
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Adjust debt

requires authentication

Records a correction or late discount, reducing the invoice (debt.md §XI).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/adjust/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"adjustment_type\": \"discount\",
    \"amount\": 200000,
    \"reason\": \"Giảm giá cho học viên cũ\",
    \"note\": \"\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/adjust/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "adjustment_type": "discount",
    "amount": 200000,
    "reason": "Giảm giá cho học viên cũ",
    "note": ""
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Điều chỉnh công nợ thành công.",
    "data": {
        "adjustment": {
            "id": 1,
            "adjustment_type": "discount"
        },
        "debt": {
            "invoice_id": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/fin/debt/adjust/{invoiceId}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

invoiceId   integer     

The invoice ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

adjustment_type   string     

correction (sửa hóa đơn) | discount (giảm giá sau phát hành). Example: discount

Must be one of:
  • correction
  • discount
amount   number     

Amount to reduce from the invoice total. Example: 200000

reason   string     

Reason for the adjustment. Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: Giảm giá cho học viên cũ

note   string  optional    

Optional note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters.

Request write-off

requires authentication

Raises a pending write-off; it applies only after approval (debt.md §XII, BR-08).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/writeoff/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"amount\": 1000000,
    \"reason\": \"Học viên bỏ học, không liên hệ được\",
    \"note\": \"\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/writeoff/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "amount": 1000000,
    "reason": "Học viên bỏ học, không liên hệ được",
    "note": ""
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Đã gửi yêu cầu xóa nợ.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "pending"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

POST v1/fin/debt/writeoff/{invoiceId}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

invoiceId   integer     

The invoice ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

amount   number  optional    

Amount to write off (defaults to the full outstanding). Example: 1000000

reason   string     

Reason for the write-off. Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: Học viên bỏ học, không liên hệ được

note   string  optional    

Optional note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters.

Deny write-off

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/writeoff/deny/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Chưa đủ căn cứ xóa nợ\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/writeoff/deny/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Chưa đủ căn cứ xóa nợ"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Từ chối xóa nợ thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "rejected"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

POST v1/fin/debt/writeoff/deny/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The write-off adjustment ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

reason   string     

Reason for rejecting the write-off. Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: Chưa đủ căn cứ xóa nợ

Collect debt

requires authentication

Records a payment against the invoice to reduce the outstanding (debt.md §X).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/collect/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"amount\": 1000000,
    \"method\": \"transfer\",
    \"account_id\": 1,
    \"transaction_id\": \"FT24009\",
    \"note\": \"Thu hồi công nợ tháng 6\",
    \"paid_at\": \"2026-06-15 10:00:00\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/collect/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "amount": 1000000,
    "method": "transfer",
    "account_id": 1,
    "transaction_id": "FT24009",
    "note": "Thu hồi công nợ tháng 6",
    "paid_at": "2026-06-15 10:00:00"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thu hồi công nợ thành công.",
    "data": {
        "debt": {
            "invoice_id": 1,
            "outstanding": "0.00"
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/fin/debt/collect/{invoiceId}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

invoiceId   integer     

The invoice ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

amount   number     

Amount collected (<= outstanding). Example: 1000000

method   string     

cash|transfer|card|wallet|other. Example: transfer

Must be one of:
  • cash
  • transfer
  • card
  • wallet
  • other
account_id   integer  optional    

Fund (quỹ) receiving the money. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

transaction_id   string  optional    

External transaction reference. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: FT24009

note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Thu hồi công nợ tháng 6

paid_at   string  optional    

Payment time (default now). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-15 10:00:00

Reconcile debts

requires authentication

Compares each invoice's paid amount against its confirmed payment allocations and reports mismatches (debt.md §XIII).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/reconcile" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/debt/reconcile"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "matched_count": 0,
        "mismatch_count": 0,
        "mismatches": []
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Finance - Invoice

Manage receivable and payable invoices, their approval, payments and lifecycle (invoice.md).

List invoices

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/list?search=INV&invoice_type=receivable&status=pending&partner_type=student&business_id=1&branch_id=1&invoice_date_from=2026-01-01&invoice_date_to=2026-12-31&due_date_from=2026-01-01&due_date_to=2026-12-31&overdue=1&sort_by=created_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "INV",
    "invoice_type": "receivable",
    "status": "pending",
    "partner_type": "student",
    "business_id": "1",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "invoice_date_from": "2026-01-01",
    "invoice_date_to": "2026-12-31",
    "due_date_from": "2026-01-01",
    "due_date_to": "2026-12-31",
    "overdue": "1",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 0,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/fin/invoice/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by code or note. Example: INV

invoice_type   string  optional    

Filter: receivable|payable. Example: receivable

status   string  optional    

Filter by status. Example: pending

partner_type   string  optional    

Filter by partner type. Example: student

business_id   integer  optional    

Filter by business id. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by branch id. Example: 1

invoice_date_from   string  optional    

date Issued on/after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-01-01

invoice_date_to   string  optional    

date Issued on/before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

due_date_from   string  optional    

date Due on/after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-01-01

due_date_to   string  optional    

date Due on/before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

overdue   boolean  optional    

Only overdue invoices with a balance. Example: true

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

asc|desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100. Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number. Example: 1

Invoice detail

requires authentication

Returns the invoice with items, payments and its status history.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/detail/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

        "invoice": {
            "id": 1,
            "code": "INV-202606-00001"
        },
        "histories": []

    "errors": null

Create invoice

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"invoice_type\": \"receivable\",
    \"business_id\": 1,
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"partner_type\": \"student\",
    \"partner_id\": 1,
    \"student_id\": 1,
    \"parent_id\": 1,
    \"enrollment_id\": 1,
    \"invoice_date\": \"2026-06-15\",
    \"due_date\": \"2026-06-30\",
    \"status\": \"pending\",
    \"subtotal\": 1000000,
    \"discount\": 0,
    \"tax\": 0,
    \"note\": \"Học phí tháng 6\",
    \"items\": [
        {
            \"name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
            \"quantity\": 2,
            \"unit_price\": 45,
            \"total\": 46
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "invoice_type": "receivable",
    "business_id": 1,
    "branch_id": 1,
    "partner_type": "student",
    "partner_id": 1,
    "student_id": 1,
    "parent_id": 1,
    "enrollment_id": 1,
    "invoice_date": "2026-06-15",
    "due_date": "2026-06-30",
    "status": "pending",
    "subtotal": 1000000,
    "discount": 0,
    "tax": 0,
    "note": "Học phí tháng 6",
    "items": [
        {
            "name": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
            "quantity": 2,
            "unit_price": 45,
            "total": 46
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo hóa đơn thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "INV-202606-00001",
        "invoice_type": "receivable",
        "status": "pending"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/fin/invoice/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

invoice_type   string     

receivable|payable. Example: receivable

Must be one of:
  • receivable
  • payable
business_id   integer     

Business (trung tâm) id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

partner_type   string  optional    

student|parent|company|teacher|staff|supplier|landlord|partner. Example: student

Must be one of:
  • student
  • parent
  • company
  • teacher
  • staff
  • supplier
  • landlord
  • partner
partner_id   integer  optional    

Id of the partner within its type. Example: 1

student_id   integer  optional    

Student id (receivable). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

parent_id   integer  optional    

Parent id (receivable). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

enrollment_id   integer  optional    

Source enrollment id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

invoice_date   string  optional    

Issue date (defaults to today). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-15

due_date   string  optional    

Payment due date. Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-30

status   string  optional    

Initial status (defaults to pending for receivable, draft for payable). Example: pending

Must be one of:
  • draft
  • pending
  • approved
  • pending_payment
  • partial
  • paid
  • cancelled
  • refunded
  • closed
subtotal   number  optional    

Amount before discount/tax (ignored when items are sent). Must be at least 0. Example: 1000000

discount   number  optional    

Discount amount. Must be at least 0. Example: 0

tax   number  optional    

Tax amount. Must be at least 0. Example: 0

note   string  optional    

Free-text note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Học phí tháng 6

items   object[]  optional    

Invoice line items.
name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

quantity   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 2

unit_price   number     

Must be at least 0. Example: 45

total   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 46

Update invoice

requires authentication

Only draft/pending invoices can be edited. Code, business and type are immutable.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"partner_type\": \"student\",
    \"partner_id\": 1,
    \"student_id\": 1,
    \"parent_id\": 1,
    \"enrollment_id\": 1,
    \"invoice_date\": \"2026-06-15\",
    \"due_date\": \"2026-06-30\",
    \"subtotal\": 1000000,
    \"discount\": 0,
    \"tax\": 0,
    \"note\": \"Cập nhật ghi chú\",
    \"items\": [
        {
            \"name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
            \"quantity\": 2,
            \"unit_price\": 45,
            \"total\": 46
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "branch_id": 1,
    "partner_type": "student",
    "partner_id": 1,
    "student_id": 1,
    "parent_id": 1,
    "enrollment_id": 1,
    "invoice_date": "2026-06-15",
    "due_date": "2026-06-30",
    "subtotal": 1000000,
    "discount": 0,
    "tax": 0,
    "note": "Cập nhật ghi chú",
    "items": [
        {
            "name": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
            "quantity": 2,
            "unit_price": 45,
            "total": 46
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật hóa đơn thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Not editable):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Chỉ có thể chỉnh sửa hóa đơn ở trạng thái nháp hoặc chưa thanh toán.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The invoice ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

branch_id   integer  optional    

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

partner_type   string  optional    

student|parent|company|teacher|staff|supplier|landlord|partner. Example: student

Must be one of:
  • student
  • parent
  • company
  • teacher
  • staff
  • supplier
  • landlord
  • partner
partner_id   integer  optional    

Id of the partner within its type. Example: 1

student_id   integer  optional    

Student id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

parent_id   integer  optional    

Parent id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

enrollment_id   integer  optional    

Source enrollment id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

invoice_date   string  optional    

Issue date. Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-15

due_date   string  optional    

Payment due date. Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-30

subtotal   number  optional    

Amount before discount/tax (ignored when items are sent). Must be at least 0. Example: 1000000

discount   number  optional    

Discount amount. Must be at least 0. Example: 0

tax   number  optional    

Tax amount. Must be at least 0. Example: 0

note   string  optional    

Free-text note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Cập nhật ghi chú

items   object[]  optional    

Replacement line items (omit to keep existing).
name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

quantity   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 2

unit_price   number     

Must be at least 0. Example: 45

total   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 46

Approve invoice

requires authentication

Approves a payable invoice so it can be paid (invoice.md §IX).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/approve/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/approve/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

    "success": true,
    "msg": "Duyệt hóa đơn thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "approved"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Deny invoice

requires authentication

Rejects a payable invoice pending approval.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/deny/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Sai thông tin\",
    \"note\": \"Đã trao đổi với kế toán\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/deny/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Sai thông tin",
    "note": "Đã trao đổi với kế toán"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Accept

Body Parameters

Cancel invoice

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/cancel/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Sai thông tin\",
    \"note\": \"Đã trao đổi với kế toán\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/cancel/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Sai thông tin",
    "note": "Đã trao đổi với kế toán"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Hủy hóa đơn thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "cancelled"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Record payment

requires authentication

Records a receipt (receivable, IN) or disbursement (payable, OUT) and updates the invoice's paid/balance amounts and status (invoice.md §X).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/payment/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"amount\": 1000000,
    \"method\": \"transfer\",
    \"transaction_id\": \"TXN-001\",
    \"note\": \"Thu học phí tháng 6\",
    \"paid_at\": \"2026-06-15 10:00:00\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/invoice/payment/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "amount": 1000000,
    "method": "transfer",
    "transaction_id": "TXN-001",
    "note": "Thu học phí tháng 6",
    "paid_at": "2026-06-15 10:00:00"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Ghi nhận thanh toán thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "paid",
        "balance_amount": "0.00"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Not payable yet):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Hóa đơn chi phải được duyệt trước khi thanh toán.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/fin/invoice/payment/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The invoice ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

amount   number     

Payment amount (<= remaining balance). Example: 1000000

method   string     

cash|transfer|card|wallet|other. Example: transfer

Must be one of:
  • cash
  • transfer
  • card
  • wallet
  • other
transaction_id   string  optional    

External transaction reference. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: TXN-001

note   string  optional    

Free-text note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Thu học phí tháng 6

paid_at   string  optional    

Payment time (defaults to now). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-15 10:00:00

Finance - Payment

Record and manage real cash-flow transactions — receipts (IN) and disbursements (OUT) — with confirm/cancel/reverse/refund and fund-balance effects (payment.md).

List payments

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/list?search=PAY&payment_direction=in&payment_type=tuition_payment&status=confirmed&account_id=1&partner_type=student&business_id=1&branch_id=1&invoice_id=1&date_from=2026-01-01&date_to=2026-12-31&per_page=20" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "PAY",
    "payment_direction": "in",
    "payment_type": "tuition_payment",
    "status": "confirmed",
    "account_id": "1",
    "partner_type": "student",
    "business_id": "1",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "invoice_id": "1",
    "date_from": "2026-01-01",
    "date_to": "2026-12-31",
    "per_page": "20",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 0,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/fin/payment/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by payment no, reference or description. Example: PAY

payment_direction   string  optional    

Filter: in|out. Example: in

payment_type   string  optional    

Filter by type. Example: tuition_payment

status   string  optional    

Filter: draft|pending|confirmed|cancelled|reversed|refunded. Example: confirmed

account_id   integer  optional    

Filter by fund id. Example: 1

partner_type   string  optional    

Filter by partner type. Example: student

business_id   integer  optional    

Filter by business id. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by branch id. Example: 1

invoice_id   integer  optional    

Filter by linked invoice id. Example: 1

date_from   string  optional    

date Payment date on/after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-01-01

date_to   string  optional    

date Payment date on/before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100. Example: 20

Payment detail

requires authentication

Returns the payment with allocations and its status history.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/detail/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "payment": {
            "id": 1,
            "payment_no": "PAY2026/000001"
        },
        "histories": []
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

GET v1/fin/payment/receipt/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept

URL Parameters

id   integer

Create payment

requires authentication

Creates a transaction in draft (or pending). It does not move any balance until confirmed (payment.md §VIII, BR-03).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"business_id\": 1,
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"payment_direction\": \"in\",
    \"payment_type\": \"tuition_payment\",
    \"partner_type\": \"student\",
    \"partner_id\": 1,
    \"invoice_id\": 1,
    \"account_id\": 1,
    \"amount\": 1000000,
    \"currency\": \"VND\",
    \"method\": \"transfer\",
    \"reference_no\": \"FT24001\",
    \"payment_date\": \"2026-06-15\",
    \"status\": \"draft\",
    \"description\": \"Thu học phí tháng 6\",
    \"allocations\": [
        {
            \"invoice_id\": 17,
            \"allocated_amount\": 11613.31890586
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "business_id": 1,
    "branch_id": 1,
    "payment_direction": "in",
    "payment_type": "tuition_payment",
    "partner_type": "student",
    "partner_id": 1,
    "invoice_id": 1,
    "account_id": 1,
    "amount": 1000000,
    "currency": "VND",
    "method": "transfer",
    "reference_no": "FT24001",
    "payment_date": "2026-06-15",
    "status": "draft",
    "description": "Thu học phí tháng 6",
    "allocations": [
        {
            "invoice_id": 17,
            "allocated_amount": 11613.31890586
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo giao dịch thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "payment_no": "PAY2026/000001",
        "status": "draft"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/fin/payment/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

business_id   integer     

Business id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

payment_direction   string     

in (thu) | out (chi). Example: in

Must be one of:
  • in
  • out
payment_type   string  optional    

tuition_payment|service_payment|debt_collection|other_income|salary_payment|teacher_payment|supplier_payment|rent_payment|marketing_payment|utility_payment|other_expense. Example: tuition_payment

Must be one of:
  • tuition_payment
  • service_payment
  • debt_collection
  • other_income
  • salary_payment
  • teacher_payment
  • supplier_payment
  • rent_payment
  • marketing_payment
  • utility_payment
  • other_expense
partner_type   string  optional    

student|parent|company|teacher|staff|supplier|landlord|partner. Example: student

Must be one of:
  • student
  • parent
  • company
  • teacher
  • staff
  • supplier
  • landlord
  • partner
partner_id   integer  optional    

Id of the partner within its type. Example: 1

invoice_id   integer  optional    

Primary linked invoice (optional). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

account_id   integer  optional    

Fund (quỹ) id whose balance moves on confirm. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

amount   number     

Transaction amount. Example: 1000000

currency   string  optional    

Currency code (default VND). Must not be greater than 10 characters. Example: VND

method   string  optional    

cash|transfer|card|wallet|other. Example: transfer

Must be one of:
  • cash
  • transfer
  • card
  • wallet
  • other
reference_no   string  optional    

Bank/e-wallet reference. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: FT24001

payment_date   string  optional    

Transaction date (default today). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-15

status   string  optional    

Initial status: draft (default) or pending. Example: draft

Must be one of:
  • draft
  • pending
description   string  optional    

Free-text description. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Thu học phí tháng 6

allocations   object[]  optional    

Split across invoices (BR-07).
invoice_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

allocated_amount   number     

Example: 11613.31890586

Update payment

requires authentication

Only draft/pending payments can be edited (BR-04).

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"payment_type\": \"tuition_payment\",
    \"partner_type\": \"student\",
    \"partner_id\": 1,
    \"invoice_id\": 1,
    \"account_id\": 1,
    \"amount\": 1000000,
    \"currency\": \"VND\",
    \"method\": \"transfer\",
    \"reference_no\": \"FT24001\",
    \"payment_date\": \"2026-06-15\",
    \"description\": \"Cập nhật diễn giải\",
    \"allocations\": [
        {
            \"invoice_id\": 17,
            \"allocated_amount\": 11613.31890586
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "branch_id": 1,
    "payment_type": "tuition_payment",
    "partner_type": "student",
    "partner_id": 1,
    "invoice_id": 1,
    "account_id": 1,
    "amount": 1000000,
    "currency": "VND",
    "method": "transfer",
    "reference_no": "FT24001",
    "payment_date": "2026-06-15",
    "description": "Cập nhật diễn giải",
    "allocations": [
        {
            "invoice_id": 17,
            "allocated_amount": 11613.31890586
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật giao dịch thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Not editable):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Chỉ có thể chỉnh sửa giao dịch ở trạng thái nháp hoặc chờ xác nhận.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

PUT v1/fin/payment/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The payment ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

branch_id   integer  optional    

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

payment_type   string  optional    

Payment type. Example: tuition_payment

Must be one of:
  • tuition_payment
  • service_payment
  • debt_collection
  • other_income
  • salary_payment
  • teacher_payment
  • supplier_payment
  • rent_payment
  • marketing_payment
  • utility_payment
  • other_expense
partner_type   string  optional    

Partner type. Example: student

Must be one of:
  • student
  • parent
  • company
  • teacher
  • staff
  • supplier
  • landlord
  • partner
partner_id   integer  optional    

Partner id. Example: 1

invoice_id   integer  optional    

Primary linked invoice. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

account_id   integer  optional    

Fund id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

amount   number  optional    

Transaction amount. Example: 1000000

currency   string  optional    

Currency code. Must not be greater than 10 characters. Example: VND

method   string  optional    

cash|transfer|card|wallet|other. Example: transfer

Must be one of:
  • cash
  • transfer
  • card
  • wallet
  • other
reference_no   string  optional    

Bank reference. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: FT24001

payment_date   string  optional    

Transaction date. Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-15

description   string  optional    

Description. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Cập nhật diễn giải

allocations   object[]  optional    

Replacement allocations (omit to keep).
invoice_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

allocated_amount   number     

Example: 11613.31890586

Confirm payment

requires authentication

Moves the fund balance and applies allocations to invoices (payment.md §VIII).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/confirm/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/confirm/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Xác nhận giao dịch thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "confirmed"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

POST v1/fin/payment/confirm/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The payment ID. Example: 1

Cancel payment

requires authentication

Allowed only before confirmation (payment.md §XI).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/cancel/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Giao dịch nhầm\",
    \"note\": \"\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/cancel/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Giao dịch nhầm",
    "note": ""
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The payment ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

reason   string     

Reason for the action. Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: Giao dịch nhầm

note   string  optional    

Optional note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters.

Reverse payment

requires authentication

Books an equal, opposite transaction undoing a confirmed payment (BR-06).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/reverse/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Giao dịch nhầm\",
    \"note\": \"\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/reverse/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Giao dịch nhầm",
    "note": ""
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Đảo giao dịch thành công.",
    "data": {

    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Refund payment

requires authentication

Books a refund transaction for part or all of a confirmed payment (payment.md §X).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/refund/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"amount\": 500000,
    \"reason\": \"Học viên đóng dư\",
    \"note\": \"\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/payment/refund/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "amount": 500000,
    "reason": "Học viên đóng dư",
    "note": ""
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Hoàn tiền thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,

    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

POST v1/fin/payment/refund/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The payment ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

amount   number  optional    

Refund amount (defaults to the full payment amount). Example: 500000

reason   string     

Reason for the refund. Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: Học viên đóng dư

note   string  optional    

Optional note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters.

Finance - Promotion

Manage promotion programmes, their lifecycle, vouchers and the apply engine (promotion.md).

List promotions

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/list?search=HANA&promotion_type=discount&status=active&active_on=2026-06-19&sort_by=created_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "HANA",
    "promotion_type": "discount",
    "status": "active",
    "active_on": "2026-06-19",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 0,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/fin/promotion/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by code or name. Example: HANA

promotion_type   string  optional    

Filter by type. Example: discount

status   string  optional    

Filter by status. Example: active

active_on   string  optional    

date Running on a given date (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-06-19

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

asc|desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100. Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number. Example: 1

curl --request GET \

Headers

Example: application/json

Accept
