Create promotion

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"promotion_name\": \"Hè 2026\",
    \"promotion_type\": \"discount\",
    \"start_date\": \"2026-06-01\",
    \"end_date\": \"2026-08-31\",
    \"priority\": 10,
    \"discount_type\": \"percent\",
    \"discount_value\": 10,
    \"max_discount\": 500000,
    \"bonus_lesson\": 2,
    \"bonus_wallet_amount\": 200000,
    \"rules\": [
        {
            \"rule_type\": \"min_order\",
            \"rule_value\": \"5000000\"
        }
    ],
    \"rewards\": [
        {
            \"reward_type\": \"discount\",
            \"reward_value\": \"10\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "promotion_name": "Hè 2026",
    "promotion_type": "discount",
    "start_date": "2026-06-01",
    "end_date": "2026-08-31",
    "priority": 10,
    "discount_type": "percent",
    "discount_value": 10,
    "max_discount": 500000,
    "bonus_lesson": 2,
    "bonus_wallet_amount": 200000,
    "rules": [
        {
            "rule_type": "min_order",
            "rule_value": "5000000"
        }
    ],
    "rewards": [
        {
            "reward_type": "discount",
            "reward_value": "10"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo chương trình khuyến mãi thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "draft"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/fin/promotion/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

promotion_name   string     

Tên chương trình. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Hè 2026

promotion_type   string     

Loại: discount | gift_lesson | wallet_credit | voucher | referral | combo. Example: discount

Must be one of:
  • discount
  • gift_lesson
  • wallet_credit
  • voucher
  • referral
  • combo
start_date   string     

Ngày bắt đầu (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-01

end_date   string     

Ngày kết thúc (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to start_date. Example: 2026-08-31

priority   integer  optional    

Độ ưu tiên khi chọn khuyến mãi tốt nhất. Must be at least 0. Example: 10

discount_type   string  optional    

percent | fixed. Example: percent

Must be one of:
  • percent
  • fixed
discount_value   number  optional    

Giá trị giảm (theo % hoặc số tiền). Must be at least 0. Example: 10

max_discount   number  optional    

Mức giảm tối đa (với loại percent). Must be at least 0. Example: 500000

bonus_lesson   integer  optional    

Số buổi học tặng. Must be at least 0. Example: 2

bonus_wallet_amount   number  optional    

Số credit ví tặng. Must be at least 0. Example: 200000

rules   object[]  optional    

Điều kiện áp dụng [{rule_type, rule_value}].
rule_type   string  optional    

This field is required when rules is present. Example: consequatur

rule_value   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

rewards   object[]  optional    

Phần thưởng [{reward_type, reward_value}].
reward_type   string  optional    

This field is required when rewards is present. Example: consequatur

reward_value   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

Update promotion

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"promotion_name\": \"Hè 2026\",
    \"start_date\": \"2026-06-01\",
    \"end_date\": \"2026-08-31\",
    \"priority\": 10,
    \"discount_type\": \"percent\",
    \"discount_value\": 10,
    \"max_discount\": 500000,
    \"bonus_lesson\": 2,
    \"bonus_wallet_amount\": 200000,
    \"rules\": [
        {
            \"rule_type\": \"min_order\",
            \"rule_value\": \"5000000\"
        }
    ],
    \"rewards\": [
        {
            \"reward_type\": \"discount\",
            \"reward_value\": \"10\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "promotion_name": "Hè 2026",
    "start_date": "2026-06-01",
    "end_date": "2026-08-31",
    "priority": 10,
    "discount_type": "percent",
    "discount_value": 10,
    "max_discount": 500000,
    "bonus_lesson": 2,
    "bonus_wallet_amount": 200000,
    "rules": [
        {
            "rule_type": "min_order",
            "rule_value": "5000000"
        }
    ],
    "rewards": [
        {
            "reward_type": "discount",
            "reward_value": "10"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật chương trình thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT v1/fin/promotion/update/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The promotion ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

promotion_name   string  optional    

Tên chương trình. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Hè 2026

start_date   string  optional    

Ngày bắt đầu (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-01

end_date   string  optional    

Ngày kết thúc (Y-m-d). Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to start_date. Example: 2026-08-31

priority   integer  optional    

Độ ưu tiên. Must be at least 0. Example: 10

discount_type   string  optional    

percent | fixed. Example: percent

Must be one of:
  • percent
  • fixed
discount_value   number  optional    

Giá trị giảm. Must be at least 0. Example: 10

max_discount   number  optional    

Mức giảm tối đa. Must be at least 0. Example: 500000

bonus_lesson   integer  optional    

Số buổi học tặng. Must be at least 0. Example: 2

bonus_wallet_amount   number  optional    

Số credit ví tặng. Must be at least 0. Example: 200000

rules   object[]  optional    

Điều kiện áp dụng (thay thế toàn bộ).
rule_type   string  optional    

This field is required when rules is present. Example: consequatur

rule_value   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

rewards   object[]  optional    

Phần thưởng (thay thế toàn bộ).
reward_type   string  optional    

This field is required when rewards is present. Example: consequatur

reward_value   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

Generate vouchers

requires authentication

Creates a batch of voucher codes for the promotion (promotion.md §IX).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/generate-vouchers/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"quantity\": 100,
    \"usage_limit\": 1,
    \"expired_at\": \"2026-08-31\",
    \"prefix\": \"HANA\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/generate-vouchers/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "quantity": 100,
    "usage_limit": 1,
    "expired_at": "2026-08-31",
    "prefix": "HANA"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Sinh voucher thành công.",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "voucher_code": "HANA2026AB"
        }
    ],
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/fin/promotion/generate-vouchers/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The promotion ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

quantity   integer     

Số lượng voucher cần sinh. Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 1000. Example: 100

usage_limit   integer  optional    

Số lần dùng tối đa mỗi voucher (mặc định 1). Must be at least 1. Example: 1

expired_at   string  optional    

Ngày hết hạn (mặc định theo ngày kết thúc chương trình). Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-08-31

prefix   string  optional    

Tiền tố mã voucher. Must not be greater than 10 characters. Example: HANA

Validate voucher

requires authentication

Checks that a voucher code is usable right now (promotion.md §IX).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/voucher/validate" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"voucher_code\": \"HANA2026AB\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/voucher/validate"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "voucher_code": "HANA2026AB"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Voucher hợp lệ.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "voucher_code": "HANA2026AB",
        "status": "active"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Invalid):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Voucher đã hết hạn.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/fin/promotion/voucher/validate

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

voucher_code   string     

Mã voucher cần kiểm tra. Example: HANA2026AB

Apply promotion

requires authentication

Resolves the promotion (by id or voucher code), computes the discount and records a usage row (promotion.md §X). Does not mutate the invoice.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/apply" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"amount\": 6000000,
    \"promotion_id\": 1,
    \"voucher_code\": \"HANA2026AB\",
    \"enrollment_id\": 1,
    \"invoice_id\": 1,
    \"customer_id\": 1
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/apply"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "amount": 6000000,
    "promotion_id": 1,
    "voucher_code": "HANA2026AB",
    "enrollment_id": 1,
    "invoice_id": 1,
    "customer_id": 1
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Áp dụng khuyến mãi thành công.",
    "data": {
        "original_amount": 6000000,
        "discount_amount": 500000,
        "final_amount": 5500000
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Below minimum):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Đơn hàng chưa đạt giá trị tối thiểu để áp dụng khuyến mãi.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/fin/promotion/apply

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

amount   number     

Giá trị đơn hàng trước khuyến mãi. Example: 6000000

promotion_id   integer  optional    

Chương trình áp dụng (nếu không dùng voucher). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

voucher_code   string  optional    

Mã voucher áp dụng. This field is required when promotion_id is not present. Example: HANA2026AB

enrollment_id   integer  optional    

Lượt ghi danh liên quan. Example: 1

invoice_id   integer  optional    

Hóa đơn liên quan. Example: 1

customer_id   integer  optional    

Khách hàng liên quan. Example: 1

Finance - Referral

Manage parent-to-parent referrals and their rewards (promotion.md §XI).

List referrals

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/referral/list?referrer_parent_id=1&status=pending&per_page=20" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/referral/list"
);

const params = {
    "referrer_parent_id": "1",
    "status": "pending",
    "per_page": "20",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 0,
            "per_page": 20,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Create referral

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/referral/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"referrer_parent_id\": 1,
    \"referred_parent_id\": 2,
    \"promotion_id\": 1,
    \"reward_amount\": 100000
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/referral/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "referrer_parent_id": 1,
    "referred_parent_id": 2,
    "promotion_id": 1,
    "reward_amount": 100000
};

}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST v1/fin/promotion/referral/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

referrer_parent_id   integer     

Phụ huynh giới thiệu. The value and referred_parent_id must be different. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

referred_parent_id   integer     

Phụ huynh được giới thiệu. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 2

promotion_id   integer  optional    

Chương trình giới thiệu liên quan. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

reward_amount   number  optional    

Giá trị thưởng dự kiến. Must be at least 0. Example: 100000

Reward referral

requires authentication

Marks a pending referral as rewarded once the referred enrollment is paid (BR011).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/referral/reward/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reward_amount\": 100000
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/fin/promotion/referral/reward/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reward_amount": 100000
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Ghi nhận thưởng giới thiệu thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "status": "rewarded"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Headers

Authorization

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

The referral ID. Example: 1

HR - Teacher

Manage teachers (full lifecycle, specialisations, certificates).

List teachers

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/list?search=jane&status=active&teacher_type=full_time&employment_type=contract&branch_id=1&manager_id=1&business_id=1&skill=IELTS&joined_from=2026-01-01&joined_to=2026-12-31&sort_by=created_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "jane",
    "status": "active",
    "teacher_type": "full_time",
    "employment_type": "contract",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "manager_id": "1",
    "business_id": "1",
    "skill": "IELTS",
    "joined_from": "2026-01-01",
    "joined_to": "2026-12-31",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET v1/hr/teacher/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by code, full name, email or phone. Example: jane

status   string  optional    

Filter by status: active, suspended, resigned. Example: active

teacher_type   string  optional    

Filter by type: full_time, part_time, freelancer, assistant. Example: full_time

employment_type   string  optional    

Filter by employment type. Example: contract

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by branch id. Example: 1

manager_id   integer  optional    

Filter by manager user id. Example: 1

business_id   integer  optional    

Filter by business id. Example: 1

skill   string  optional    

Filter by skill name (one or many). Example: IELTS

joined_from   string  optional    

date Joined on or after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-01-01

joined_to   string  optional    

date Joined on or before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: code, full_name, joined_at, created_at, status. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

Teacher detail

requires authentication

Returns the full teacher record with all relations and operational statistics.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/detail/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

curl --request POST \

Request      

POST v1/hr/teacher/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

full_name   string     

Full name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Jane Doe

code   string     

Unique teacher code. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: TCH001

avatar   string  optional    

Avatar path. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: avatars/jane.png

gender   string  optional    

male|female|other. Example: female

Must be one of:
  • male
  • female
  • other
dob   string  optional    

Date of birth (<= today). Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 1990-05-12

email   string     

Unique email. Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: jane@hana.edu.vn

phone   string     

Unique phone. Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0901234567

identity_no   string  optional    

ID / passport number. Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: 079012345678

address   string  optional    

Address. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: 123 Lê Lợi, Hà Nội

branch_id   integer     

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

joined_at   string     

Joining date. Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-01-10

teacher_type   string     

full_time|part_time|freelancer|assistant. Example: full_time

Must be one of:
  • full_time
  • part_time
  • freelancer
  • assistant
employment_type   string     

Cooperation form. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: contract

hourly_rate   number  optional    

Hourly rate. Must be at least 0. Example: 150000

monthly_salary   number  optional    

Monthly salary. Must be at least 0. Example: 15000000

bank_account   object  optional    

Bank account (Tài khoản ngân hàng).
bank_name   string  optional    

Bank name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Vietcombank

bank_account_number   string  optional    

Account number. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: 0123456789

bank_account_holder   string  optional    

Account holder name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: NGUYEN VAN A

bank_branch   string  optional    

Branch (optional). Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Chi nhánh Hà Nội

manager_id   integer  optional    

Manager user id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

business_id   integer  optional    

Business id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Giáo viên tốt nghiệp đại học Ngoại ngữ

skills   object[]     

Specialisations (at least one required). Must have at least 1 items.
skill_name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

level   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

Update teacher

requires authentication

Partial update — only send fields to change. Code and status are immutable.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"full_name\": \"Jane Doe\",
    \"avatar\": \"avatars\\/jane.png\",
    \"gender\": \"female\",
    \"dob\": \"1990-05-12\",
    \"email\": \"jane@hana.edu.vn\",
    \"phone\": \"0901234567\",
    \"identity_no\": \"079012345678\",
    \"address\": \"123 Lê Lợi, Hà Nội\",
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"teacher_type\": \"part_time\",
    \"employment_type\": \"contract\",
    \"hourly_rate\": 200000,
    \"monthly_salary\": 15000000,
    \"bank_account\": {
        \"bank_name\": \"Vietcombank\",
        \"bank_account_number\": \"0123456789\",
        \"bank_account_holder\": \"NGUYEN VAN A\",
        \"bank_branch\": \"Chi nhánh Hà Nội\"
    },
    \"manager_id\": 1,
    \"note\": \"Chuyển sang dạy part-time\",
    \"skills\": [
        {
            \"skill_name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
            \"level\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "full_name": "Jane Doe",
    "avatar": "avatars\/jane.png",
    "gender": "female",
    "dob": "1990-05-12",
    "email": "jane@hana.edu.vn",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "identity_no": "079012345678",
    "address": "123 Lê Lợi, Hà Nội",
    "branch_id": 1,
    "teacher_type": "part_time",
    "employment_type": "contract",
    "hourly_rate": 200000,
    "monthly_salary": 15000000,
    "bank_account": {
        "bank_name": "Vietcombank",
        "bank_account_number": "0123456789",
        "bank_account_holder": "NGUYEN VAN A",
        "bank_branch": "Chi nhánh Hà Nội"
    },
    "manager_id": 1,
    "note": "Chuyển sang dạy part-time",
    "skills": [
        {
            "skill_name": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
            "level": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật giáo viên thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "TCH001",
        "full_name": "Jane Doe",
        "teacher_type": "part_time",
        "employment_type": "contract",
        "hourly_rate": 200000,
        "monthly_salary": null,
        "status": "active",
        "joined_at": "2026-01-10",
        "skills": [
            {
                "id": 2,
                "skill_name": "TOEIC",
                "level": "intermediate"
            }
        ],
        "created_by": 1,
        "updated_by": 1,
        "deleted_by": null,
        "created_at": "2026-06-13T08:00:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-06-13T09:00:00.000000Z",
        "deleted_at": null
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Headers

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The teacher ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

full_name   string  optional    

Full name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Jane Doe

avatar   string  optional    

Avatar path. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: avatars/jane.png

gender   string  optional    

male|female|other. Example: female

Must be one of:
  • male
  • female
  • other
dob   string  optional    

Date of birth (<= today). Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 1990-05-12

email   string  optional    

Unique email. Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: jane@hana.edu.vn

phone   string  optional    

Unique phone. Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0901234567

identity_no   string  optional    

ID / passport number. Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: 079012345678

address   string  optional    

Address. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: 123 Lê Lợi, Hà Nội

branch_id   integer  optional    

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

teacher_type   string  optional    

full_time|part_time|freelancer|assistant. Example: part_time

Must be one of:
  • full_time
  • part_time
  • freelancer
  • assistant
employment_type   string  optional    

Cooperation form. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: contract

hourly_rate   number  optional    

Hourly rate. Must be at least 0. Example: 200000

monthly_salary   number  optional    

Monthly salary. Must be at least 0. Example: 15000000

bank_account   object  optional    

Bank account (Tài khoản ngân hàng).
bank_name   string  optional    

Bank name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Vietcombank

bank_account_number   string  optional    

Account number. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: 0123456789

bank_account_holder   string  optional    

Account holder name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: NGUYEN VAN A

bank_branch   string  optional    

Branch (optional). Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Chi nhánh Hà Nội

manager_id   integer  optional    

Manager user id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

note   string  optional    

Note. Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: Chuyển sang dạy part-time

skills   object[]  optional    

Specialisations (replaces all existing when provided).
skill_name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

level   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

Suspend teacher

requires authentication

Moves a teacher to "suspended" status and records the reason.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/suspend/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"Tạm nghỉ cá nhân\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/suspend/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "Tạm nghỉ cá nhân"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Ngừng giáo viên thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "TCH001",
        "full_name": "Jane Doe",
        "status": "suspended",
        "created_at": "2026-06-13T08:00:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-06-13T09:00:00.000000Z",
        "deleted_at": null
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Already suspended):


{
    "success": false,
    "msg": "Giáo viên đang ở trạng thái tạm ngừng.",
    "data": null,
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

Reason for suspending. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: Tạm nghỉ cá nhân

Restore teacher

requires authentication

Reactivates a suspended teacher back to "active".

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/restore/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/restore/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

        "status": "active",

Resign teacher

requires authentication

Marks a teacher as resigned. Blocked while they still hold active classes.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/resign/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"resigned_at\": \"2026-06-30\",
    \"reason\": \"Chuyển công tác\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/resign/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "resigned_at": "2026-06-30",
    "reason": "Chuyển công tác"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cho giáo viên nghỉ việc thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "code": "TCH001",
        "full_name": "Jane Doe",
        "status": "resigned",
        "resigned_at": "2026-06-30",
        "created_at": "2026-06-13T08:00:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-06-13T10:00:00.000000Z",
        "deleted_at": null
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example response (200, Still holds classes):

    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

HR - Teacher Certificate

Manage a teacher's professional certificates.

List certificates for a teacher

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/certificate/list/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/certificate/list/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": [

            "teacher_id": 1,

            "expired_date": "2027-03-01",

            "is_expiring_soon": false,

GET v1/hr/teacher/certificate/list/{teacherId}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

teacherId   integer     

The teacher ID. Example: 1

Add certificate to a teacher

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/certificate/create/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"certificate_name\": \"IELTS 8.0\",
    \"issuer\": \"British Council\",
    \"issued_date\": \"2024-03-01\",
    \"expired_date\": \"2027-03-01\",
    \"attachment\": \"certificates\\/ielts.pdf\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/certificate/create/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "certificate_name": "IELTS 8.0",
    "issuer": "British Council",
    "issued_date": "2024-03-01",
    "expired_date": "2027-03-01",
    "attachment": "certificates\/ielts.pdf"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST v1/hr/teacher/certificate/create/{teacherId}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

teacherId   integer     

The teacher ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

certificate_name   string     

Certificate name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: IELTS 8.0

issuer   string  optional    

Issuing organisation. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: British Council

issued_date   string  optional    

Issue date. Must be a valid date. Example: 2024-03-01

expired_date   string  optional    

Expiry date (>= issued_date). Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to issued_date. Example: 2027-03-01

attachment   string  optional    

Attachment file path. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: certificates/ielts.pdf

Update certificate

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/certificate/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"certificate_name\": \"IELTS 8.5\",
    \"issuer\": \"British Council\",
    \"issued_date\": \"2024-03-01\",
    \"expired_date\": \"2027-03-01\",
    \"attachment\": \"certificates\\/ielts.pdf\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/hr/teacher/certificate/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "certificate_name": "IELTS 8.5",
    "issuer": "British Council",
    "issued_date": "2024-03-01",
    "expired_date": "2027-03-01",
    "attachment": "certificates\/ielts.pdf"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

DELETE v1/hr/teacher/certificate/delete/{id}

Headers

Authorization

System - Activity Log

Read-only system audit trail (spec 028). Logs are immutable — there is no create/update/delete endpoint (BR-02, BR-03, BR-06).

List activity logs

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/activity-log/list?search=Student&module=education&entity=Student&action=update&status=success&user_id=1&period=7d&date_from=2026-06-01&date_to=2026-06-18" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/activity-log/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "Student",
    "module": "education",
    "entity": "Student",
    "action": "update",
    "status": "success",
    "user_id": "1",
    "period": "7d",
    "date_from": "2026-06-01",
    "date_to": "2026-06-18",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "code": 401,
    "msg": "Không có quyền truy cập!",
    "errors": [],
    "data": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/sys/activity-log/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Match description or entity_id. Example: Student

module   string  optional    

Filter by module. Example: education

entity   string  optional    

Filter by entity. Example: Student

action   string  optional    

Filter by action. Example: update

status   string  optional    

Filter by status. Example: success

user_id   integer  optional    

Filter by actor. Example: 1

period   string  optional    

Relative range: today, 7d, 30d. Example: 7d

date_from   string  optional    

date Range start (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-06-01

date_to   string  optional    

date Range end (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-06-18

Activity log statistics

requires authentication

Counters by module/action plus top users and failed logins (spec 028 §XII).

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/activity-log/statistics" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/activity-log/statistics"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

System - Branch

Manage branches (cơ sở) belonging to a Business.

List branches

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/branch/list?search=Qu%E1%BA%ADn+1&business_id=1&status=active&manager_id=1&province=Ho+Chi+Minh&sort_by=created_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/branch/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "Quận 1",
    "business_id": "1",
    "status": "active",
    "manager_id": "1",
    "province": "Ho Chi Minh",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "business_id": 1,
                "code": "BR001",
                "name": "Quận 1",
                "short_name": "Q1",
                "status": "active",
                "phone": "0900000000",
                "email": "q1@example.com",
                "address": "12 Lê Lợi"
            }
        ],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 1,
            "per_page": 15,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

GET v1/sys/branch/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by branch code or name. Example: Quận 1

business_id   integer  optional    

Filter by business id. Example: 1

status   string  optional    

Filter by status. Example: active

manager_id   integer  optional    

Filter by manager user id. Example: 1

province   string  optional    

Filter by province. Example: Ho Chi Minh

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: code, name, created_at, status. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

Branch detail

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/branch/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

);

};

    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

GET v1/sys/branch/detail/{id}

Headers

Authorization

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Create branch

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/branch/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"business_id\": 1,
    \"code\": \"Q1\",
    \"name\": \"Chi nhánh Quận 1\",
    \"short_name\": \"Q1\",
    \"status\": \"active\",
    \"phone\": \"0901234567\",
    \"email\": \"q1@hana.edu.vn\",
    \"website\": \"https:\\/\\/hana.edu.vn\",
    \"address\": \"123 Le Loi\",
    \"province\": \"Ho Chi Minh\",
    \"district\": \"District 1\",
    \"ward\": \"Ben Nghe\",
    \"postal_code\": \"700000\",
    \"manager_id\": 1,
    \"capacity\": 200,
    \"opened_at\": \"2026-01-01\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/branch/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "business_id": 1,
    "code": "Q1",
    "name": "Chi nhánh Quận 1",
    "short_name": "Q1",
    "status": "active",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "email": "q1@hana.edu.vn",
    "website": "https:\/\/hana.edu.vn",
    "address": "123 Le Loi",
    "province": "Ho Chi Minh",
    "district": "District 1",
    "ward": "Ben Nghe",
    "postal_code": "700000",
    "manager_id": 1,
    "capacity": 200,
    "opened_at": "2026-01-01"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo chi nhánh thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "business_id": 1,
        "code": "BR001",
        "name": "Quận 1",
        "status": "active"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST v1/sys/branch/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

business_id   integer     

Owning business id (must be active). Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

code   string     

Branch code, unique within the business. Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: Q1

name   string     

Branch name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Chi nhánh Quận 1

short_name   string  optional    

Short name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Q1

status   string     

active|inactive. Example: active

Must be one of:
  • active
  • inactive
  • suspended
phone   string     

Hotline. Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0901234567

email   string     

Contact email. Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: q1@hana.edu.vn

website   string  optional    

Website. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: https://hana.edu.vn

address   string     

Address. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: 123 Le Loi

province   string     

Province. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Ho Chi Minh

district   string     

District. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: District 1

ward   string  optional    

Ward. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Ben Nghe

postal_code   string  optional    

Postal code. Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: 700000

manager_id   integer  optional    

Branch manager user id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

capacity   integer  optional    

Max capacity. Must be at least 0. Example: 200

opened_at   string  optional    

Opening date. Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-01-01

Update branch

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/branch/update/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"Chi nhánh Quận 1\",
    \"short_name\": \"Q1\",
    \"status\": \"active\",
    \"phone\": \"0901234567\",
    \"email\": \"q1@hana.edu.vn\",
    \"website\": \"https:\\/\\/hana.edu.vn\",
    \"address\": \"123 Le Loi\",
    \"province\": \"Ho Chi Minh\",
    \"district\": \"District 1\",
    \"ward\": \"Ben Nghe\",
    \"postal_code\": \"700000\",
    \"manager_id\": 1,
    \"capacity\": 200
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/branch/update/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "Chi nhánh Quận 1",
    "short_name": "Q1",
    "status": "active",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "email": "q1@hana.edu.vn",
    "website": "https:\/\/hana.edu.vn",
    "address": "123 Le Loi",
    "province": "Ho Chi Minh",
    "district": "District 1",
    "ward": "Ben Nghe",
    "postal_code": "700000",
    "manager_id": 1,
    "capacity": 200
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Cập nhật chi nhánh thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "business_id": 1,
        "code": "BR001",
        "name": "Quận 1 (mới)",
        "status": "active"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Example: application/json

The branch ID. Example: 1

Body Parameters

Branch name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Chi nhánh Quận 1

short_name   string  optional    

Short name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Q1

status   string  optional    

active|inactive. Example: active

Must be one of:
  • active
  • inactive
  • suspended
phone   string  optional    

Hotline. Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0901234567

email   string  optional    

Contact email. Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: q1@hana.edu.vn

website   string  optional    

Website. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: https://hana.edu.vn

address   string  optional    

Address. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: 123 Le Loi

district   string  optional    

District. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: District 1

ward   string  optional    

Ward. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Ben Nghe

postal_code   string  optional    

Postal code. Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: 700000

manager_id   integer  optional    

Branch manager user id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

capacity   integer  optional    

Max capacity. Must be at least 0. Example: 200

System - Business

Manage businesses (centers / branches).

List businesses

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/business/list?search=Hana&status=active&manager_id=1&created_from=2026-01-01&created_to=2026-12-31&sort_by=created_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/business/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "Hana",
    "status": "active",
    "manager_id": "1",
    "created_from": "2026-01-01",
    "created_to": "2026-12-31",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "business_code": "BIZ001",
                "name": "Hana English",
                "short_name": "Hana",
                "prefix": "HN",
                "status": "active",
                "phone": "0900000000",
                "email": "info@example.com"
            }
        ],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 1,
            "per_page": 15,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1

Request      

GET v1/sys/business/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by business code or name. Example: Hana

status   string  optional    

Filter by status. Example: active

manager_id   integer  optional    

Filter by manager user id. Example: 1

created_from   string  optional    

date Created on or after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-01-01

created_to   string  optional    

date Created on or before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: business_code, name, created_at, status. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

Business detail

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/business/detail/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/business/detail/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",

        "business": {
            "id": 1,
            "business_code": "BIZ001",
            "name": "Hana English",
            "short_name": "Hana",
            "status": "active"
        },
        "statistics": {
            "branches": 3,
            "users": 25
        }

    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Create business

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/business/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"business_code\": \"HCM001\",
    \"name\": \"Hana English HCM\",
    \"short_name\": \"Hana HCM\",
    \"prefix\": \"HCM\",
    \"tax_code\": \"0312345678\",
    \"website\": \"https:\\/\\/hana.edu.vn\",
    \"phone\": \"0901234567\",
    \"email\": \"hcm@hana.edu.vn\",
    \"address\": \"123 Le Loi\",
    \"province\": \"Ho Chi Minh\",
    \"district\": \"District 1\",
    \"ward\": \"Ben Nghe\",
    \"zip_code\": \"700000\",
    \"manager_id\": 1,
    \"status\": \"active\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/business/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "business_code": "HCM001",
    "name": "Hana English HCM",
    "short_name": "Hana HCM",
    "prefix": "HCM",
    "tax_code": "0312345678",
    "website": "https:\/\/hana.edu.vn",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "email": "hcm@hana.edu.vn",
    "address": "123 Le Loi",
    "province": "Ho Chi Minh",
    "district": "District 1",
    "ward": "Ben Nghe",
    "zip_code": "700000",
    "manager_id": 1,
    "status": "active"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo Business thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "business_code": "BIZ001",
        "name": "Hana English",
        "short_name": "Hana",
        "status": "active"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}

Request      

POST v1/sys/business/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

business_code   string     

Unique business code. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: HCM001

name   string     

Business name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Hana English HCM

short_name   string  optional    

Short name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Hana HCM

prefix   string     

Uppercase code prefix. Must match the regex /^[A-Z0-9]+$/. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: HCM

tax_code   string  optional    

Tax code. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: 0312345678

website   string  optional    

Website. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: https://hana.edu.vn

phone   string     

Hotline. Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0901234567

email   string     

Contact email. Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: hcm@hana.edu.vn

address   string     

Address. Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: 123 Le Loi

province   string     

Province. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Ho Chi Minh

district   string     

District. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: District 1

ward   string  optional    

Ward. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Ben Nghe

zip_code   string  optional    

Zip code. Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: 700000

manager_id   integer  optional    

Manager user id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

status   string     

active|inactive. Example: active

Must be one of:
  • active
  • inactive
  • suspended

requires authentication

    \"short_name\": \"Hana HCM\",

    \"district\": \"District 1\",

    "district": "District 1",

System - User

Manage system user accounts.

List users

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/user/list?search=super&business_id=1&branch_id=1&role_id=2&status=active&created_from=2026-01-01&created_to=2026-12-31&sort_by=created_at&sort_dir=desc&per_page=20&page=1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/user/list"
);

const params = {
    "search": "super",
    "business_id": "1",
    "branch_id": "1",
    "role_id": "2",
    "status": "active",
    "created_from": "2026-01-01",
    "created_to": "2026-12-31",
    "sort_by": "created_at",
    "sort_dir": "desc",
    "per_page": "20",
    "page": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Thao tác thành công",
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "user_id": "U001",
                "username": "super",
                "full_name": "John Doe",
                "email": "super@example.com",
                "status": "active",
                "is_active": true,
                "is_admin": false,
                "business_id": 1,
                "branch_id": 1,
                "role_id": 2
            }
        ],
        "pagination": {
            "total": 1,
            "per_page": 15,
            "current_page": 1,
            "last_page": 1
        }
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET v1/sys/user/list

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

search   string  optional    

Search by code, full name, email or phone. Example: super

business_id   integer  optional    

Filter by business id. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Filter by branch id. Example: 1

role_id   integer  optional    

Filter by role id. Example: 2

status   string  optional    

Filter by status. Example: active

created_from   string  optional    

date Created on or after (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-01-01

created_to   string  optional    

date Created on or before (Y-m-d). Example: 2026-12-31

sort_by   string  optional    

Sort column: code, full_name, email, created_at, status. Example: created_at

sort_dir   string  optional    

Sort direction: asc or desc (default desc). Example: desc

per_page   integer  optional    

Page size: 20, 50 or 100 (default 20). Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

Page number (default 1). Example: 1

Create user

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/user/create" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"full_name\": \"Nguyen Van A\",
    \"email\": \"a@hana.edu.vn\",
    \"phone\": \"0901234567\",
    \"username\": \"teacher01\",
    \"password\": \"Abc@1234\",
    \"business_id\": 1,
    \"branch_id\": 1,
    \"role_id\": 1,
    \"department\": \"Academic\",
    \"gender\": \"male\",
    \"dob\": \"1995-05-20\",
    \"avatar\": \"avatars\\/a.png\",
    \"is_admin\": true,
    \"status\": \"active\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/user/create"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "full_name": "Nguyen Van A",
    "email": "a@hana.edu.vn",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "username": "teacher01",
    "password": "Abc@1234",
    "business_id": 1,
    "branch_id": 1,
    "role_id": 1,
    "department": "Academic",
    "gender": "male",
    "dob": "1995-05-20",
    "avatar": "avatars\/a.png",
    "is_admin": true,
    "status": "active"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Tạo người dùng thành công.",

        "username": "super",
        "full_name": "John Doe",
        "email": "super@example.com",

        "is_active": true

Request      

POST v1/sys/user/create

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

full_name   string     

Full name. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Nguyen Van A

email   string     

Login email (unique). Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: a@hana.edu.vn

phone   string     

Phone (unique). Must match the regex /^[0-9+-\s().]{6,20}$/. Example: 0901234567

username   string     

Login username (unique). Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: teacher01

password   string     

Min 8, upper/lower/number. Example: Abc@1234

business_id   integer     

Business id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

branch_id   integer  optional    

Branch id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

role_id   integer     

Role id. Must match an existing stored value. Example: 1

department   string  optional    

Department. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Academic

gender   string  optional    

male|female|other. Example: male

Must be one of:
  • male
  • female
  • other
dob   string  optional    

Date of birth. Must be a valid date. Example: 1995-05-20

avatar   string  optional    

Avatar path. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: avatars/a.png

is_admin   boolean  optional    

Example: true

status   string     

active|inactive|locked. Example: active

Must be one of:
  • active
  • inactive
  • locked

requires authentication

);

Activate user

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/user/activate/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/user/activate/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Kích hoạt tài khoản thành công.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "username": "super",
        "status": "active",
        "is_active": true
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

POST v1/sys/user/activate/{id}

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The user ID. Example: 1

Reset user password

requires authentication

Generates a new password for the user and returns it once.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/user/reset-password/1" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://api.anhnguhana.com/v1/sys/user/reset-password/1"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


{
    "success": true,
    "msg": "Đặt lại mật khẩu thành công.",
    "data": {
        "user": {
            "id": 1,
            "username": "super",
            "full_name": "John Doe"
        },
        "password": "Xy7$kPq2"
    },
    "code": 200,
    "errors": null
}
Received response:
